text: The wise man shall not take an oath improperly; taking an improper oath, one becomes ruined here as well as after death.
iast: na vṛthā śapathaṃ kuryāt svalpe 'pyarthe naro budhaḥ vṛthā hi śapathaṃ kurvan pretya caiha ca naśyati

sanskrit_iast: kāminīṣu vivāheṣu gavāṃ bhakṣye tathaindhane brāhmaṇābhyupapattau ca śapathe nāsti pātakam
meaning: कामिनीषु विवाहेषु गवां भक्ष्ये तथैन्धने ब्राह्मणाभ्युपपत्तौ च शपथे नास्ति पातकम्
text: There is no serious offence in swearing to women, or in connection with marriages, fodder for cows, or fuel, or for the sake of a Brāhmaṇa.
iast: kāminīṣu vivāheṣu gavāṃ bhakṣye tathaindhane brāhmaṇābhyupapattau ca śapathe nāsti pātakam

sanskrit_iast: satyena śāpayedvipraṃ kṣatriyaṃ vāhanāyudhaiḥ gobījakāñcanairvaiśyaṃ śūdraṃ sarvaistu pātakaiḥ
meaning: सत्येन शापयेद्विप्रं क्षत्रियं वाहनायुधैः गोबीजकाञ्चनैर्वैश्यं शूद्रं सर्वैस्तु पातकैः
text: The Brāhmaṇa should be made to swear by truth, the Kṣatriya by conveyances and weapons, the Vaiśya by cattle, grains and gold, and the Śūdra by all sins.
iast: satyena śāpayedvipraṃ kṣatriyaṃ vāhanāyudhaiḥ gobījakāñcanairvaiśyaṃ śūdraṃ sarvaistu pātakaiḥ

sanskrit_iast: agniṃ vā 'hārayedenamapsu cainaṃ nimajjayet putradārasya vā 'pyenaṃ śirāṃsi sparśayet pṛthak
meaning: अग्निं वा 'हारयेदेनमप्सु चैनं निमज्जयेत् पुत्रदारस्य वा 'प्येनं शिरांसि स्पर्शयेत् पृथक्
text: Or, he may make him fetch fire, or make him dive under water, or make him touch the heads of his son and wife severally.
iast: agniṃ vā 'hārayedenamapsu cainaṃ nimajjayet putradārasya vā 'pyenaṃ śirāṃsi sparśayet pṛthak

sanskrit_iast: yamiddho na dahatyagnirāpo naunmajjayanti ca na cārtiṃ ṛcchati kṣipraṃ sa jñeyaḥ śapathe śuciḥ
meaning: यमिद्धो न दहत्यग्निरापो नौन्मज्जयन्ति च न चार्तिं ऋच्छति क्षिप्रं स ज्ञेयः शपथे शुचिः
text: He whom the blazing fire burns not, or whom the water does not throw up, or who does not speedily suffer some misfortune, should be regarded as pure on his oath.
iast: yamiddho na dahatyagnirāpo naunmajjayanti ca na cārtiṃ ṛcchati kṣipraṃ sa jñeyaḥ śapathe śuciḥ

sanskrit_iast: vatsasya hyabhiśastasya purā bhrātrā yavīyasā nāgnirdadāha romāpi satyena jagataḥ spaśaḥ
meaning: वत्सस्य ह्यभिशस्तस्य पुरा भ्रात्रा यवीयसा नाग्निर्ददाह रोमापि सत्येन जगतः स्पशः
text: Formerly when Vatsa was accused by his younger brother, fire, the world’s spy, did not burn even a hair of his, because of truth.
iast: vatsasya hyabhiśastasya purā bhrātrā yavīyasā nāgnirdadāha romāpi satyena jagataḥ spaśaḥ

sanskrit_iast: yasmin yasmin vivāde tu kauṭasākṣyaṃ kṛtaṃ bhavet tat tat kāryaṃ nivarteta kṛtaṃ cāpyakṛtaṃ bhavet
meaning: यस्मिन् यस्मिन् विवादे तु कौटसाक्ष्यं कृतं भवेत् तत् तत् कार्यं निवर्तेत कृतं चाप्यकृतं भवेत्
text: In whatever suit false evidence should have been given, the effect of that shall cease, and what has been done shall be undone.
iast: yasmin yasmin vivāde tu kauṭasākṣyaṃ kṛtaṃ bhavet tat tat kāryaṃ nivarteta kṛtaṃ cāpyakṛtaṃ bhavet

sanskrit_iast: lobhātmohādbhayātmaitrāt kāmāt krodhāt tathaiva ca ajñānādbālabhāvātca sākṣyaṃ vitathamucyate
meaning: लोभात्मोहाद्भयात्मैत्रात् कामात् क्रोधात् तथैव च अज्ञानाद्बालभावात्च साक्ष्यं वितथमुच्यते
text: Evidence is called ‘false,’ when it is due to greed, or embarrassment, or fright, or friendship, or lust, or anger, or ignorance, ok childishness.
iast: lobhātmohādbhayātmaitrāt kāmāt krodhāt tathaiva ca ajñānādbālabhāvātca sākṣyaṃ vitathamucyate

sanskrit_iast: eṣāmanyatame sthāne yaḥ sākṣyamanṛtaṃ vadet tasya daṇḍaviśeṣāṃstu pravakṣyāmyanupūrvaśaḥ
meaning: एषामन्यतमे स्थाने यः साक्ष्यमनृतं वदेत् तस्य दण्डविशेषांस्तु प्रवक्ष्याम्यनुपूर्वशः
text: I am going to explain, in due order, the particular punishments for him who should give false evidence from any one of these causes.
iast: eṣāmanyatame sthāne yaḥ sākṣyamanṛtaṃ vadet tasya daṇḍaviśeṣāṃstu pravakṣyāmyanupūrvaśaḥ

sanskrit_iast: lobhāt sahasraṃ daṇḍyastu mohāt pūrvaṃ tu sāhasam bhayāddvau madhyamau daṇḍau maitrāt pūrvaṃ caturguṇam
meaning: लोभात् सहस्रं दण्ड्यस्तु मोहात् पूर्वं तु साहसम् भयाद्द्वौ मध्यमौ दण्डौ मैत्रात् पूर्वं चतुर्गुणम्
text: If through greed, he should be fined a thousand; if through embarrassment, the lowest amercement; if through fear, two middlling ones; if through friendship, four times the first.
iast: lobhāt sahasraṃ daṇḍyastu mohāt pūrvaṃ tu sāhasam bhayāddvau madhyamau daṇḍau maitrāt pūrvaṃ caturguṇam

sanskrit_iast: kāmāddaśaguṇaṃ pūrvaṃ krodhāt tu triguṇaṃ param ajñānāddve śate pūrṇe bāliśyātśatameva tu
meaning: कामाद्दशगुणं पूर्वं क्रोधात् तु त्रिगुणं परम् अज्ञानाद्द्वे शते पूर्णे बालिश्यात्शतमेव तु
text: If through lust, ten times the first; if through anger, three times the next; if through ignorance, full two hundred; and if through childishness, only a hundred.
iast: kāmāddaśaguṇaṃ pūrvaṃ krodhāt tu triguṇaṃ param ajñānāddve śate pūrṇe bāliśyātśatameva tu

sanskrit_iast: etānāhuḥ kauṭasākṣye proktān daṇḍān manīṣibhiḥ dharmasyāvyabhicārārthamadharmaniyamāya ca
meaning: एतानाहुः कौटसाक्ष्ये प्रोक्तान् दण्डान् मनीषिभिः धर्मस्याव्यभिचारार्थमधर्मनियमाय च
text: They declare these penalties for false evidence to have been prescribed by the wise, for the purpose that justice may not fail and injustice hay be prevented.
iast: etānāhuḥ kauṭasākṣye proktān daṇḍān manīṣibhiḥ dharmasyāvyabhicārārthamadharmaniyamāya ca

sanskrit_iast: kauṭasākṣyaṃ tu kurvāṇāṃstrīn varṇān dhārmiko nṛpaḥ pravāsayeddaṇḍayitvā brāhmaṇaṃ tu vivāsayet
meaning: कौटसाक्ष्यं तु कुर्वाणांस्त्रीन् वर्णान् धार्मिको नृपः प्रवासयेद्दण्डयित्वा ब्राह्मणं तु विवासयेत्
text: The king shall however fine and then banish the three castes giving false evidence; but the Brāhmaṇa he shall deprive of his clothes (and dwelling).
iast: kauṭasākṣyaṃ tu kurvāṇāṃstrīn varṇān dhārmiko nṛpaḥ pravāsayeddaṇḍayitvā brāhmaṇaṃ tu vivāsayet

sanskrit_iast: daśa sthānāni daṇḍasya manuḥ svayaṃbhuvo 'bravīt triṣu varṇeṣu yāni syurakṣato brāhmaṇo vrajet
meaning: दश स्थानानि दण्डस्य मनुः स्वयंभुवो 'ब्रवीत् त्रिषु वर्णेषु यानि स्युरक्षतो ब्राह्मणो व्रजेत्
text: Manu Svāyambhuva has named ten places for punishment, where it should be inflicted in the case of the three castes; but the Brāhmaṇa shall depart unscathed.
iast: daśa sthānāni daṇḍasya manuḥ svayaṃbhuvo 'bravīt triṣu varṇeṣu yāni syurakṣato brāhmaṇo vrajet

sanskrit_iast: upasthamudaraṃ jihvā hastau pādau ca pañcamam cakṣurnāsā ca karṇau ca dhanaṃ dehastathaiva ca
meaning: उपस्थमुदरं जिह्वा हस्तौ पादौ च पञ्चमम् चक्षुर्नासा च कर्णौ च धनं देहस्तथैव च
text: (1) The genital organ, (2) the stomach, (3) the tongue, (4) the hands, (5) the feet, (6) the eye, (7) the nose, (8) the ears, (9) the property and (10) the body.
iast: upasthamudaraṃ jihvā hastau pādau ca pañcamam cakṣurnāsā ca karṇau ca dhanaṃ dehastathaiva ca

sanskrit_iast: anubandhaṃ parijñāya deśakālau ca tattvataḥ sārāparādho cālokya daṇḍaṃ daṇḍyeṣu pātayet
meaning: अनुबन्धं परिज्ञाय देशकालौ च तत्त्वतः सारापराधो चालोक्य दण्डं दण्ड्येषु पातयेत्
text: Having duly ascertained the motive and the time and place, and having taken into consideration the condition (of the accused) and the nature of the offence,—he shall inflict punishment upon those deserving punishment.
iast: anubandhaṃ parijñāya deśakālau ca tattvataḥ sārāparādho cālokya daṇḍaṃ daṇḍyeṣu pātayet

sanskrit_iast: adharmadaṇḍanaṃ loke yaśoghnaṃ kīrtināśanam asvargyaṃ ca paratrāpi tasmāt tat parivarjayet
meaning: अधर्मदण्डनं लोके यशोघ्नं कीर्तिनाशनम् अस्वर्ग्यं च परत्रापि तस्मात् तत् परिवर्जयेत्
text: Unjust punishment is destructive of reputation among men and subversive of fame; in the other world also it leads to loss of heaven; he shall therefore avoid it.
iast: adharmadaṇḍanaṃ loke yaśoghnaṃ kīrtināśanam asvargyaṃ ca paratrāpi tasmāt tat parivarjayet

sanskrit_iast: adaṇḍyān daṇḍayan rājā daṇḍyāṃścaivāpyadaṇḍayan ayaśo mahadāpnoti narakaṃ caiva gacchati
meaning: अदण्ड्यान् दण्डयन् राजा दण्ड्यांश्चैवाप्यदण्डयन् अयशो महदाप्नोति नरकं चैव गच्छति
text: The king, punishing those who do not deserve to be punished, and not punishing those who deserve to be punished, attains great ill-fame and goes to hell.
iast: adaṇḍyān daṇḍayan rājā daṇḍyāṃścaivāpyadaṇḍayan ayaśo mahadāpnoti narakaṃ caiva gacchati

sanskrit_iast: vāgdaṇḍaṃ prathamaṃ kuryāddhigdaṇḍaṃ tadanantaram tṛtīyaṃ dhanadaṇḍaṃ tu vadhadaṇḍamataḥ param
meaning: वाग्दण्डं प्रथमं कुर्याद्धिग्दण्डं तदनन्तरम् तृतीयं धनदण्डं तु वधदण्डमतः परम्
text: First of all, he shall inflict punishment in the form of reprimand, then in the form of reproach, thirdly in the form of fine, and after that the death-penalty.
iast: vāgdaṇḍaṃ prathamaṃ kuryāddhigdaṇḍaṃ tadanantaram tṛtīyaṃ dhanadaṇḍaṃ tu vadhadaṇḍamataḥ param

sanskrit_iast: vadhenāpi yadā tvetānnigrahītuṃ na śaknuyāt tadaiṣu sarvamapyetat prayuñjīta catuṣṭayam
meaning: वधेनापि यदा त्वेतान्निग्रहीतुं न शक्नुयात् तदैषु सर्वमप्येतत् प्रयुञ्जीत चतुष्टयम्
text: When however he is not able to restrain them even by the ‘death-penalty,’—then he should inflict on them all these four.
iast: vadhenāpi yadā tvetānnigrahītuṃ na śaknuyāt tadaiṣu sarvamapyetat prayuñjīta catuṣṭayam

sanskrit_iast: lokasaṃvyavahārārthaṃ yāḥ saṃjñāḥ prathitā bhuvi tāmrarūpyasuvarṇānāṃ tāḥ pravakṣyāmyaśeṣataḥ
meaning: लोकसंव्यवहारार्थं याः संज्ञाः प्रथिता भुवि ताम्ररूप्यसुवर्णानां ताः प्रवक्ष्याम्यशेषतः
text: I am going to describe fully, for the sake of business-transactions, those technical terms that are used in the world in connection with silver and gold.
iast: lokasaṃvyavahārārthaṃ yāḥ saṃjñāḥ prathitā bhuvi tāmrarūpyasuvarṇānāṃ tāḥ pravakṣyāmyaśeṣataḥ

sanskrit_iast: jālāntaragate bhānau yat sūkṣmaṃ dṛśyate rajaḥ prathamaṃ tat pramāṇānāṃ trasareṇuṃ pracakṣate
meaning: जालान्तरगते भानौ यत् सूक्ष्मं दृश्यते रजः प्रथमं तत् प्रमाणानां त्रसरेणुं प्रचक्षते
text: The small mote that is seen when the sun shines through a lattice-hole they declare to be the ‘triad,’ the very first of measures.
iast: jālāntaragate bhānau yat sūkṣmaṃ dṛśyate rajaḥ prathamaṃ tat pramāṇānāṃ trasareṇuṃ pracakṣate

sanskrit_iast: trasareṇavo 'ṣṭau vijñeyā likṣaikā parimāṇataḥ tā rājasarṣapastisraste trayo gaurasarṣapaḥ
meaning: त्रसरेणवो 'ष्टौ विज्ञेया लिक्षैका परिमाणतः ता राजसर्षपस्तिस्रस्ते त्रयो गौरसर्षपः
text: Eight Triads should be known as one ‘Louse-egg’ in measure; three of these as one ‘Black Mustard’; and three of these latter as a ‘White Mustard.’
iast: trasareṇavo 'ṣṭau vijñeyā likṣaikā parimāṇataḥ tā rājasarṣapastisraste trayo gaurasarṣapaḥ

sanskrit_iast: sarṣapāḥ ṣaḍ yavo madhyastriyavaṃ tvekakṛṣṇalam pañcakṛṣṇalako māṣaste suvarṇastu ṣoḍaśa
meaning: सर्षपाः षड् यवो मध्यस्त्रियवं त्वेककृष्णलम् पञ्चकृष्णलको माषस्ते सुवर्णस्तु षोडश
text: Six ‘mustards’ make one middling ‘barley-corn’; three of these make one ‘guñjā-berry’; a ‘bean’ is made of five ‘guñja-berries;’ and sixteen ‘beans’ make one ‘gold-piece.’
iast: sarṣapāḥ ṣaḍ yavo madhyastriyavaṃ tvekakṛṣṇalam pañcakṛṣṇalako māṣaste suvarṇastu ṣoḍaśa

sanskrit_iast: palaṃ suvarṇāścatvāraḥ palāni dharaṇaṃ daśa dve kṛṣṇale samadhṛte vijñeyo raupyamāṣakaḥ rūpyamāṣakaḥ
meaning: पलं सुवर्णाश्चत्वारः पलानि धरणं दश द्वे कृष्णले समधृते विज्ञेयो रौप्यमाषकः रूप्यमाषकः
text: Four ‘gold-pieces’ make one ‘pala,’ ten palas one ‘dharaṇa’; and two ‘guñja-berries’ of equal weight should be known as one ‘silver-bean.’
iast: palaṃ suvarṇāścatvāraḥ palāni dharaṇaṃ daśa dve kṛṣṇale samadhṛte vijñeyo raupyamāṣakaḥ rūpyamāṣakaḥ

sanskrit_iast: te ṣoḍaśa syāddharaṇaṃ purāṇaścaiva rājataḥ kārṣāpaṇastu vijñeyastāmrikaḥ kārṣikaḥ paṇaḥ
meaning: ते षोडश स्याद्धरणं पुराणश्चैव राजतः कार्षापणस्तु विज्ञेयस्ताम्रिकः कार्षिकः पणः
text: Sixteen of these latter make one ‘silver-dharaṇa’ or ‘purāṇa’; and a ‘karṣa’ of copper is to be known as ‘kārṣāpaṇa’ or ‘paṇa.’
iast: te ṣoḍaśa syāddharaṇaṃ purāṇaścaiva rājataḥ kārṣāpaṇastu vijñeyastāmrikaḥ kārṣikaḥ paṇaḥ

sanskrit_iast: dharaṇāni daśa jñeyaḥ śatamānastu rājataḥ catuḥsauvarṇiko niṣko vijñeyastu pramāṇataḥ
meaning: धरणानि दश ज्ञेयः शतमानस्तु राजतः चतुःसौवर्णिको निष्को विज्ञेयस्तु प्रमाणतः
text: Ten ‘dharaṇas’ are to be known as the ‘silver śatamāna’ (centimetre); and the ‘niṣka’ should be understood as four ‘gold-pieces’ in weight.
iast: dharaṇāni daśa jñeyaḥ śatamānastu rājataḥ catuḥsauvarṇiko niṣko vijñeyastu pramāṇataḥ

sanskrit_iast: paṇānāṃ dve śate sārdhe prathamaḥ sāhasaḥ smṛtaḥ madhyamaḥ pañca vijñeyaḥ sahasraṃ tveva cauttamaḥ
meaning: पणानां द्वे शते सार्धे प्रथमः साहसः स्मृतः मध्यमः पञ्च विज्ञेयः सहस्रं त्वेव चौत्तमः
text: The first amercement has been declared to be two hundred and fifty paṇas; the middling is to be known as five hundred; and the highest as a thousand.
iast: paṇānāṃ dve śate sārdhe prathamaḥ sāhasaḥ smṛtaḥ madhyamaḥ pañca vijñeyaḥ sahasraṃ tveva cauttamaḥ

sanskrit_iast: ṛṇe deye pratijñāte pañcakaṃ śatamarhati apahnave taddviguṇaṃ tan manoranuśāsanam
meaning: ऋणे देये प्रतिज्ञाते पञ्चकं शतमर्हति अपह्नवे तद्द्विगुणं तन् मनोरनुशासनम्
text: On the debt being admitted to be due, the debtor deserves (a fine of) five per cent.; and in the case of denial, twice as much; such is the ordinance of manu.
iast: ṛṇe deye pratijñāte pañcakaṃ śatamarhati apahnave taddviguṇaṃ tan manoranuśāsanam

sanskrit_iast: vasiṣṭhavihitāṃ vṛddhiṃ sṛjedvittavivardhinīm aśītibhāgaṃ gṛhṇīyān māsādvārdhuṣikaḥ śate
meaning: वसिष्ठविहितां वृद्धिं सृजेद्वित्तविवर्धिनीम् अशीतिभागं गृह्णीयान् मासाद्वार्धुषिकः शते
text: The money-lender shall stipulate an interest sanctioned by Vasiṣṭha, for increasing the capital. He shall take monthly the eightieth part of a hundred.
iast: vasiṣṭhavihitāṃ vṛddhiṃ sṛjedvittavivardhinīm aśītibhāgaṃ gṛhṇīyān māsādvārdhuṣikaḥ śate

sanskrit_iast: dvikaṃ śataṃ vā gṛhṇīyāt satāṃ dharmamanusmaran dvikaṃ śataṃ hi gṛhṇāno na bhavatyarthakilbiṣī
meaning: द्विकं शतं वा गृह्णीयात् सतां धर्ममनुस्मरन् द्विकं शतं हि गृह्णानो न भवत्यर्थकिल्बिषी
text: Or, remembering the duty of the righteous, he may take two in the hundred; by taking two per cent. he does not incur the sin of extortion.
iast: dvikaṃ śataṃ vā gṛhṇīyāt satāṃ dharmamanusmaran dvikaṃ śataṃ hi gṛhṇāno na bhavatyarthakilbiṣī

sanskrit_iast: dvikaṃ trikaṃ catuṣkaṃ ca pañcakaṃ ca śataṃ samam māsasya vṛddhiṃ gṛhṇīyādvarṇānāmanupūrvaśaḥ
meaning: द्विकं त्रिकं चतुष्कं च पञ्चकं च शतं समम् मासस्य वृद्धिं गृह्णीयाद्वर्णानामनुपूर्वशः
text: He may charge just two, three, four or five per cent. per month from the four castes respectively.
iast: dvikaṃ trikaṃ catuṣkaṃ ca pañcakaṃ ca śataṃ samam māsasya vṛddhiṃ gṛhṇīyādvarṇānāmanupūrvaśaḥ

sanskrit_iast: na tvevādhau saupakāre kausīdīṃ vṛddhimāpnuyāt na cādheḥ kālasaṃrodhātnisargo 'sti na vikrayaḥ
meaning: न त्वेवाधौ सौपकारे कौसीदीं वृद्धिमाप्नुयात् न चाधेः कालसंरोधात्निसर्गो 'स्ति न विक्रयः
text: But when there is profitable pledge, he shall receive no interest on the loan; and there shall be neither transference nor sale of the pledge, merely by the lapse of time.
iast: na tvevādhau saupakāre kausīdīṃ vṛddhimāpnuyāt na cādheḥ kālasaṃrodhātnisargo 'sti na vikrayaḥ

sanskrit_iast: na bhoktavyo balādādhirbhuñjāno vṛddhimutsṛjet mūlyena toṣayeccainamādhisteno 'nyathā bhavet
meaning: न भोक्तव्यो बलादाधिर्भुञ्जानो वृद्धिमुत्सृजेत् मूल्येन तोषयेच्चैनमाधिस्तेनो 'न्यथा भवेत्
text: The pledge shall not be used by force; using it thus, he shall renounce the interest; he shall satisfy the other party with its pr ice; otherwise he would be a stealer of the pledge.
iast: na bhoktavyo balādādhirbhuñjāno vṛddhimutsṛjet mūlyena toṣayeccainamādhisteno 'nyathā bhavet

sanskrit_iast: ādhiścaupanidhiścaubhau na kālātyayamarhataḥ avahāryau bhavetāṃ tau dīrghakālamavasthitau
meaning: आधिश्चौपनिधिश्चौभौ न कालात्ययमर्हतः अवहार्यौ भवेतां तौ दीर्घकालमवस्थितौ
text: Pledges and Deposits should not suffer much lapse of time; for being left over for a long time, they would be liable to appropriation.
iast: ādhiścaupanidhiścaubhau na kālātyayamarhataḥ avahāryau bhavetāṃ tau dīrghakālamavasthitau

sanskrit_iast: saṃprītyā bhujyamānāni na naśyanti kadā cana dhenuruṣṭro vahannaśvo yaśca damyaḥ prayujyate
meaning: संप्रीत्या भुज्यमानानि न नश्यन्ति कदा चन धेनुरुष्ट्रो वहन्नश्वो यश्च दम्यः प्रयुज्यते
text: Things used through favour are never forfeited; such as a milch cow, a camel, an ox or the animal that is made over for breaking in.
iast: saṃprītyā bhujyamānāni na naśyanti kadā cana dhenuruṣṭro vahannaśvo yaśca damyaḥ prayujyate

sanskrit_iast: yat kiṃ ciddaśavarṣāṇi saṃnidhau prekṣate dhanī bhujyamānaṃ paraistūṣṇīṃ na sa tatlabdhumarhati
meaning: यत् किं चिद्दशवर्षाणि संनिधौ प्रेक्षते धनी भुज्यमानं परैस्तूष्णीं न स तत्लब्धुमर्हति
text: Whatever thing the owner meekly sees being used by others in his presence, for ten years,—that thing he does not deserve to recover.
iast: yat kiṃ ciddaśavarṣāṇi saṃnidhau prekṣate dhanī bhujyamānaṃ paraistūṣṇīṃ na sa tatlabdhumarhati

sanskrit_iast: ajaḍaścedapogaṇḍo viṣaye cāsya bhujyate bhagnaṃ tadvyavahāreṇa bhoktā taddravyamarhati taddhanamarhati
meaning: अजडश्चेदपोगण्डो विषये चास्य भुज्यते भग्नं तद्व्यवहारेण भोक्ता तद्द्रव्यमर्हति तद्धनमर्हति
text: If the owner is neither an idiot nor a minor, and the property is used in his own country,—it becomes frustrated in law, and the user becomes entitled to the property.
iast: ajaḍaścedapogaṇḍo viṣaye cāsya bhujyate bhagnaṃ tadvyavahāreṇa bhoktā taddravyamarhati taddhanamarhati

sanskrit_iast: ādhiḥ sīmā bāladhanaṃ nikṣepaupanidhiḥ striyaḥ nikṣepaupanidhī rājasvaṃ śrotriyasvaṃ ca na bhogena praṇaśyati
meaning: आधिः सीमा बालधनं निक्षेपौपनिधिः स्त्रियः निक्षेपौपनिधी राजस्वं श्रोत्रियस्वं च न भोगेन प्रणश्यति
text: A pledge, a boundary, minor’s property, a deposit, a property enjoyed by favour, women, king’s property, and the property of a vedic scholar are not lost by adverse possession.
iast: ādhiḥ sīmā bāladhanaṃ nikṣepaupanidhiḥ striyaḥ nikṣepaupanidhī rājasvaṃ śrotriyasvaṃ ca na bhogena praṇaśyati

sanskrit_iast: yaḥ svāminā 'nanujñātamādhiṃ bhūṅkte 'vicakṣaṇaḥ tenārdhavṛddhirmoktavyā tasya bhogasya niṣkṛtiḥ
meaning: यः स्वामिना 'ननुज्ञातमाधिं भूङ्क्ते 'विचक्षणः तेनार्धवृद्धिर्मोक्तव्या तस्य भोगस्य निष्कृतिः
text: The fool, who, without the owner’s permission, uses a deposit, shall have to remit half the amount of the interest, as compensation for such use.
iast: yaḥ svāminā 'nanujñātamādhiṃ bhūṅkte 'vicakṣaṇaḥ tenārdhavṛddhirmoktavyā tasya bhogasya niṣkṛtiḥ

sanskrit_iast: kusīdavṛddhirdvaiguṇyaṃ nātyeti sakṛdāhṛtā sakṛdāhitā dhānye sade lave vāhye nātikrāmati pañcatām
meaning: कुसीदवृद्धिर्द्वैगुण्यं नात्येति सकृदाहृता सकृदाहिता धान्ये सदे लवे वाह्ये नातिक्रामति पञ्चताम्
text: Interest on money-loans stipulated at one time shall not exceed the double; in the case of grains, fruits, wool and beasts of burden, it shall not go beyond the quintuple.
iast: kusīdavṛddhirdvaiguṇyaṃ nātyeti sakṛdāhṛtā sakṛdāhitā dhānye sade lave vāhye nātikrāmati pañcatām

sanskrit_iast: kṛtānusārādadhikā vyatiriktā na sidhyati kusīdapathamāhustaṃ pañcakaṃ śatamarhati
meaning: कृतानुसारादधिका व्यतिरिक्ता न सिध्यति कुसीदपथमाहुस्तं पञ्चकं शतमर्हति
text: Interest, stipulated in contravention of the law, being excessive, is not payable. They declare this to be the usurer’s way. It is only five per cent. to which the man is entitled.
iast: kṛtānusārādadhikā vyatiriktā na sidhyati kusīdapathamāhustaṃ pañcakaṃ śatamarhati

sanskrit_iast: nātisāṃvatsarīṃ vṛddhiṃ na cādṛṣṭāṃ punarharet vinirharet cakravṛddhiḥ kālavṛddhiḥ kāritā kāyikā ca yā
meaning: नातिसांवत्सरीं वृद्धिं न चादृष्टां पुनर्हरेत् विनिर्हरेत् चक्रवृद्धिः कालवृद्धिः कारिता कायिका च या
text: One shall not pay or receive an interest beyond the annual, or what is unapproved (or unaccumulated); nor compound interest, nor periodical interest, nor that which is (privately) stipulated, nor corporeal.
iast: nātisāṃvatsarīṃ vṛddhiṃ na cādṛṣṭāṃ punarharet vinirharet cakravṛddhiḥ kālavṛddhiḥ kāritā kāyikā ca yā

sanskrit_iast: ṛṇaṃ dātumaśakto yaḥ kartumicchet punaḥ kriyām sa dattvā nirjitāṃ vṛddhiṃ karaṇaṃ parivartayet
meaning: ऋणं दातुमशक्तो यः कर्तुमिच्छेत् पुनः क्रियाम् स दत्त्वा निर्जितां वृद्धिं करणं परिवर्तयेत्
text: He who, unable to repay the debt, wishes to renew the contract, shall change the bond, after paying the accrued interest.
iast: ṛṇaṃ dātumaśakto yaḥ kartumicchet punaḥ kriyām sa dattvā nirjitāṃ vṛddhiṃ karaṇaṃ parivartayet

sanskrit_iast: adarśayitvā tatraiva hiraṇyaṃ parivartayet yāvatī saṃbhavedvṛddhistāvatīṃ dātumarhati
meaning: अदर्शयित्वा तत्रैव हिरण्यं परिवर्तयेत् यावती संभवेद्वृद्धिस्तावतीं दातुमर्हति
text: Not having brought forward the gold, he should renew the bond; and he should pay as much interest as may be possible.
iast: adarśayitvā tatraiva hiraṇyaṃ parivartayet yāvatī saṃbhavedvṛddhistāvatīṃ dātumarhati

sanskrit_iast: cakravṛddhiṃ samārūḍho deśakālavyavasthitaḥ atikrāman deśakālau na tatphalamavāpnuyāt
meaning: चक्रवृद्धिं समारूढो देशकालव्यवस्थितः अतिक्रामन् देशकालौ न तत्फलमवाप्नुयात्
text: When a man has entered into a ‘wheel-contract’ wtth reference to a particular place or time,—if he fails in regard to the place or time, he shall not suffer its reward.
iast: cakravṛddhiṃ samārūḍho deśakālavyavasthitaḥ atikrāman deśakālau na tatphalamavāpnuyāt

sanskrit_iast: samudrayānakuśalā deśakālārthadarśinaḥ sthāpayanti tu yāṃ vṛddhiṃ sā tatrādhigamaṃ prati
meaning: समुद्रयानकुशला देशकालार्थदर्शिनः स्थापयन्ति तु यां वृद्धिं सा तत्राधिगमं प्रति
text: As regards the exact amount to be paid, the interest shall be that which is fixed by persons expert in sea-voyages, and those capable of calculating the profits in connection with a particular place and time.
iast: samudrayānakuśalā deśakālārthadarśinaḥ sthāpayanti tu yāṃ vṛddhiṃ sā tatrādhigamaṃ prati

sanskrit_iast: yo yasya pratibhūstiṣṭheddarśanāyaiha mānavaḥ adarśayan sa taṃ tasya prayacchet svadhanādṛṇam tasya yateta
meaning: यो यस्य प्रतिभूस्तिष्ठेद्दर्शनायैह मानवः अदर्शयन् स तं तस्य प्रयच्छेत् स्वधनादृणम् तस्य यतेत
text: When a man stands surety for the appearance of a person, if he does not produce him, he shall pay his debt out of his own property.
iast: yo yasya pratibhūstiṣṭheddarśanāyaiha mānavaḥ adarśayan sa taṃ tasya prayacchet svadhanādṛṇam tasya yateta

sanskrit_iast: prātibhāvyaṃ vṛthādānamākṣikaṃ saurikāṃ ca yat daṇḍaśulkāvaśeṣaṃ ca na putro dātumarhati
meaning: प्रातिभाव्यं वृथादानमाक्षिकं सौरिकां च यत् दण्डशुल्कावशेषं च न पुत्रो दातुमर्हति
text: But the son shall not be liable to pay the surety-money, or a futile gift, or gambling deists, or debts due to liquor, or the balance of fines and duties.
iast: prātibhāvyaṃ vṛthādānamākṣikaṃ saurikāṃ ca yat daṇḍaśulkāvaśeṣaṃ ca na putro dātumarhati

sanskrit_iast: darśanaprātibhāvye tu vidhiḥ syāt pūrvacoditaḥ dānapratibhuvi prete dāyādānapi dāpayet
meaning: दर्शनप्रातिभाव्ये तु विधिः स्यात् पूर्वचोदितः दानप्रतिभुवि प्रेते दायादानपि दापयेत्
text: The law laid down in the preceding verse shall apply to the case of ‘Surety for appearance’; in the case of the death of the ‘Surety for payment’ however, the king shall make the heirs also to pay up.
iast: darśanaprātibhāvye tu vidhiḥ syāt pūrvacoditaḥ dānapratibhuvi prete dāyādānapi dāpayet

sanskrit_iast: adātari punardātā vijñātaprakṛtāvṛṇam paścāt pratibhuvi prete parīpset kena hetunā
meaning: अदातरि पुनर्दाता विज्ञातप्रकृतावृणम् पश्चात् प्रतिभुवि प्रेते परीप्सेत् केन हेतुना
text: “By what means then would the creditor seek to obtain his dues, in the event of the death of the surety other than that for ‘payment,’ whose character is fully known?”
iast: adātari punardātā vijñātaprakṛtāvṛṇam paścāt pratibhuvi prete parīpset kena hetunā

sanskrit_iast: nirādiṣṭadhanaścet tu pratibhūḥ syādalaṃdhanaḥ svadhanādeva taddadyānnirādiṣṭa iti sthitiḥ
meaning: निरादिष्टधनश्चेत् तु प्रतिभूः स्यादलंधनः स्वधनादेव तद्दद्यान्निरादिष्ट इति स्थितिः
text: If the surety were one to whom money had been made over and who had enough money,—then he to whom it had been made over shall pay it out ok his own property; such is the settled rule.
iast: nirādiṣṭadhanaścet tu pratibhūḥ syādalaṃdhanaḥ svadhanādeva taddadyānnirādiṣṭa iti sthitiḥ

sanskrit_iast: mattaunmattārtādhyadhīnairbālena sthavireṇa vā asaṃbaddhakṛtaścaiva vyāvahāro na sidhyati
meaning: मत्तौन्मत्तार्ताध्यधीनैर्बालेन स्थविरेण वा असंबद्धकृतश्चैव व्यावहारो न सिध्यति
text: A transaction is not valid when effected by one who is drunk, or insane, or distressed, or wholly dependent, or minor, or senile, or unauthorised
iast: mattaunmattārtādhyadhīnairbālena sthavireṇa vā asaṃbaddhakṛtaścaiva vyāvahāro na sidhyati

sanskrit_iast: satyā na bhāṣā bhavati yadyapi syāt pratiṣṭhitā bahiścedbhāṣyate dharmātniyatādvyavahārikāt
meaning: सत्या न भाषा भवति यद्यपि स्यात् प्रतिष्ठिता बहिश्चेद्भाष्यते धर्मात्नियताद्व्यवहारिकात्
text: No contract, even though substantiated, is valid, if what is contracted for is contrary to law or to established custom.
iast: satyā na bhāṣā bhavati yadyapi syāt pratiṣṭhitā bahiścedbhāṣyate dharmātniyatādvyavahārikāt

sanskrit_iast: yogādhamanavikrītaṃ yogadānapratigraham yatra vā 'pyupadhiṃ paśyet tat sarvaṃ vinivartayet
meaning: योगाधमनविक्रीतं योगदानप्रतिग्रहम् यत्र वा 'प्युपधिं पश्येत् तत् सर्वं विनिवर्तयेत्
text: Fraudulent mortgages and sales, fraudelent gifts and acceptances, as also all wherein he detects fraud—he shall nullify.
iast: yogādhamanavikrītaṃ yogadānapratigraham yatra vā 'pyupadhiṃ paśyet tat sarvaṃ vinivartayet

sanskrit_iast: grahītā yadi naṣṭaḥ syāt kuṭumbārthe kṛto vyayaḥ kuṭumbe ca dātavyaṃ bāndhavaistat syāt pravibhaktairapi svataḥ
meaning: ग्रहीता यदि नष्टः स्यात् कुटुम्बार्थे कृतो व्ययः कुटुम्बे च दातव्यं बान्धवैस्तत् स्यात् प्रविभक्तैरपि स्वतः
text: When the borrower is lost, and the expenditure was incurred by the family, the debt is to be paid by the relatives out of their own property, even though these may have been separated.
iast: grahītā yadi naṣṭaḥ syāt kuṭumbārthe kṛto vyayaḥ kuṭumbe ca dātavyaṃ bāndhavaistat syāt pravibhaktairapi svataḥ

sanskrit_iast: kuṭumbārthe 'dhyadhīno 'pi vyavahāraṃ yamācaret svadeśe vā videśe vā taṃ jyāyānna vicālayet
meaning: कुटुम्बार्थे 'ध्यधीनो 'पि व्यवहारं यमाचरेत् स्वदेशे वा विदेशे वा तं ज्यायान्न विचालयेत्
text: Should even a servant effect a transaction for the sake of the family,—the master, whether in his own country or abroad, should not repudiate it.
iast: kuṭumbārthe 'dhyadhīno 'pi vyavahāraṃ yamācaret svadeśe vā videśe vā taṃ jyāyānna vicālayet

sanskrit_iast: balāddattaṃ balādbhuktaṃ balādyaccāpi lekhitam sarvān balakṛtānarthānakṛtān manurabravīt
meaning: बलाद्दत्तं बलाद्भुक्तं बलाद्यच्चापि लेखितम् सर्वान् बलकृतानर्थानकृतान् मनुरब्रवीत्
text: What is given by force, what is ennjoyed by force, what has been caused to be written by force,—all thansactions effected by force Manu has declared to be void.
iast: balāddattaṃ balādbhuktaṃ balādyaccāpi lekhitam sarvān balakṛtānarthānakṛtān manurabravīt

sanskrit_iast: trayaḥ parārthe kliśyanti sākṣiṇaḥ pratibhūḥ kulam catvārastūpacīyante vipra āḍhyo vaṇilg nṛpaḥ
meaning: त्रयः परार्थे क्लिश्यन्ति साक्षिणः प्रतिभूः कुलम् चत्वारस्तूपचीयन्ते विप्र आढ्यो वणिल्ग् नृपः
text: Three persons suffer for the sake of others: witnesses, surety and the judge: while four persons prosper: the brāhmaṇa, the affluent, the merchant and the king.
iast: trayaḥ parārthe kliśyanti sākṣiṇaḥ pratibhūḥ kulam catvārastūpacīyante vipra āḍhyo vaṇilg nṛpaḥ

sanskrit_iast: anādeyaṃ nādadīta parikṣīṇo 'pi pārthivaḥ na cādeyaṃ samṛddho 'pi sūkṣmamapyarthamutsṛjet
meaning: अनादेयं नाददीत परिक्षीणो 'पि पार्थिवः न चादेयं समृद्धो 'पि सूक्ष्ममप्यर्थमुत्सृजेत्
text: Even though reduced (in circumstances), the King shall not take what ought not to be taken; and even though affluent, he shall not relinquish what ought to be taken, be it ever so small.
iast: anādeyaṃ nādadīta parikṣīṇo 'pi pārthivaḥ na cādeyaṃ samṛddho 'pi sūkṣmamapyarthamutsṛjet

sanskrit_iast: anādeyasya cādānādādeyasya ca varjanāt daurbalyaṃ khyāpyate rājñaḥ sa pretyaiha ca naśyati
meaning: अनादेयस्य चादानादादेयस्य च वर्जनात् दौर्बल्यं ख्याप्यते राज्ञः स प्रेत्यैह च नश्यति
text: By the taking of what he ought not to take and by the relinquishing of what he ought to take the king’s weakness becomes proclaimed, and he becomes ruined here as also after death.
iast: anādeyasya cādānādādeyasya ca varjanāt daurbalyaṃ khyāpyate rājñaḥ sa pretyaiha ca naśyati

sanskrit_iast: svādānādvarṇasaṃsargāt tvabalānāṃ ca rakṣaṇāt balaṃ sañjāyate rājñaḥ sa pretyaiha ca vardhate
meaning: स्वादानाद्वर्णसंसर्गात् त्वबलानां च रक्षणात् बलं सञ्जायते राज्ञः स प्रेत्यैह च वर्धते
text: By taking what is his due, by the proper adjustment of castes, and by protecting the weak, the power of the king grows, and he prospers here as also after death.
iast: svādānādvarṇasaṃsargāt tvabalānāṃ ca rakṣaṇāt balaṃ sañjāyate rājñaḥ sa pretyaiha ca vardhate

sanskrit_iast: tasmādyama iva svāmī svayaṃ hitvā priyāpriye varteta yāmyayā vṛttyā jitakrodho jitaindriyaḥ
meaning: तस्माद्यम इव स्वामी स्वयं हित्वा प्रियाप्रिये वर्तेत याम्यया वृत्त्या जितक्रोधो जितैन्द्रियः
text: For these reasons, the King shall, like Yama, renounce his likes and dislikes, and behave in the manner of Yama,—his anger suppressed and his senses controlled.
iast: tasmādyama iva svāmī svayaṃ hitvā priyāpriye varteta yāmyayā vṛttyā jitakrodho jitaindriyaḥ

sanskrit_iast: yastvadharmeṇa kāryāṇi mohāt kuryānnarādhipaḥ acirāt taṃ durātmānaṃ vaśe kurvanti śatravaḥ
meaning: यस्त्वधर्मेण कार्याणि मोहात् कुर्यान्नराधिपः अचिरात् तं दुरात्मानं वशे कुर्वन्ति शत्रवः
text: If an evil-minded king, through folly, deal with cases unjustly,—his enemies bring him under their control in no time.
iast: yastvadharmeṇa kāryāṇi mohāt kuryānnarādhipaḥ acirāt taṃ durātmānaṃ vaśe kurvanti śatravaḥ

sanskrit_iast: kāmakrodhau tu saṃyamya yo 'rthān dharmeṇa paśyati prajāstamanuvartante samudramiva sindhavaḥ
meaning: कामक्रोधौ तु संयम्य यो 'र्थान् धर्मेण पश्यति प्रजास्तमनुवर्तन्ते समुद्रमिव सिन्धवः
text: When however, having subdued love and hatred, he deals with cases justly, his subjects turn towards him, as the rivers towards the ocean,
iast: kāmakrodhau tu saṃyamya yo 'rthān dharmeṇa paśyati prajāstamanuvartante samudramiva sindhavaḥ

sanskrit_iast: yaḥ sādhayantaṃ chandena vedayeddhanikaṃ nṛpe sa rājñā tatcaturbhāgaṃ dāpyastasya ca taddhanam
meaning: यः साधयन्तं छन्देन वेदयेद्धनिकं नृपे स राज्ञा तत्चतुर्भागं दाप्यस्तस्य च तद्धनम्
text: A person who complains to the king against the creditor trying to accomplish his purpose by his own will,—should be made by the king to pay the fourth part, and also the total amount to him
iast: yaḥ sādhayantaṃ chandena vedayeddhanikaṃ nṛpe sa rājñā tatcaturbhāgaṃ dāpyastasya ca taddhanam

sanskrit_iast: karmaṇā 'pi samaṃ kuryāddhanikāyādhamarṇikaḥ samo 'vakṛṣṭajātistu dadyātśreyāṃstu tatśanaiḥ
meaning: कर्मणा 'पि समं कुर्याद्धनिकायाधमर्णिकः समो 'वकृष्टजातिस्तु दद्यात्श्रेयांस्तु तत्शनैः
text: Even by labour shall the debtor make good what is due to the creditor, if he is of the same or of a lower caste; the superior person shall pay it up gradually.
iast: karmaṇā 'pi samaṃ kuryāddhanikāyādhamarṇikaḥ samo 'vakṛṣṭajātistu dadyātśreyāṃstu tatśanaiḥ

sanskrit_iast: anena vidhinā rājā mitho vivadatāṃ nṛṇām sākṣipratyayasiddhāni kāryāṇi samatāṃ nayet
meaning: अनेन विधिना राजा मिथो विवदतां नृणाम् साक्षिप्रत्ययसिद्धानि कार्याणि समतां नयेत्
text: In this manner shall the king settle the disputes of men quarrelling among themselves, deciding them with the help of witnesses and other evidence.
iast: anena vidhinā rājā mitho vivadatāṃ nṛṇām sākṣipratyayasiddhāni kāryāṇi samatāṃ nayet

sanskrit_iast: kulaje vṛttasaṃpanne dharmajñe satyavādini mahāpakṣe dhaninyārye nikṣepaṃ nikṣipedbudhaḥ
meaning: कुलजे वृत्तसंपन्ने धर्मज्ञे सत्यवादिनि महापक्षे धनिन्यार्ये निक्षेपं निक्षिपेद्बुधः
text: The wise man shall, entrust a deposit to one who is born of good family, is endowed with character, cognisant of the law, and truthful, has a large following, and is wealthy and honourable
iast: kulaje vṛttasaṃpanne dharmajñe satyavādini mahāpakṣe dhaninyārye nikṣepaṃ nikṣipedbudhaḥ

sanskrit_iast: yo yathā nikṣipeddhaste yamarthaṃ yasya mānavaḥ sa tathaiva grahītavyo yathā dāyastathā grahaḥ
meaning: यो यथा निक्षिपेद्धस्ते यमर्थं यस्य मानवः स तथैव ग्रहीतव्यो यथा दायस्तथा ग्रहः
text: In the form in which one shall deposit a thing in the hands of another person, in that same form shall that thing be received back; as the delivery so the recovery.
iast: yo yathā nikṣipeddhaste yamarthaṃ yasya mānavaḥ sa tathaiva grahītavyo yathā dāyastathā grahaḥ

sanskrit_iast: yo nikṣepaṃ yācyamāno nikṣepturna prayacchati sa yācyaḥ prāḍvivākena tatnikṣepturasaṃnidhau
meaning: यो निक्षेपं याच्यमानो निक्षेप्तुर्न प्रयच्छति स याच्यः प्राड्विवाकेन तत्निक्षेप्तुरसंनिधौ
text: When requested to restore the deposit, if the trustee do not restore it to the depositor,—then, on the departure of that depositor, in the event of there being no witnesses, the judge shall actually deposit gold (with the trustee) through spies of proper age and appearance, under some pretexts, and then ask him to restore it.
iast: yo nikṣepaṃ yācyamāno nikṣepturna prayacchati sa yācyaḥ prāḍvivākena tatnikṣepturasaṃnidhau

sanskrit_iast: sākṣiabhāve praṇidhibhirvayorūpasamanvitaiḥ apadeśaiśca saṃnyasya hiraṇyaṃ tasya tattvataḥ
meaning: साक्षिअभावे प्रणिधिभिर्वयोरूपसमन्वितैः अपदेशैश्च संन्यस्य हिरण्यं तस्य तत्त्वतः
text: When requested to restore the deposit, if the trustee do not restore it to the depositor,—then, on the departure of that depositor, in the event of there being no witnesses, the judge shall actually deposit gold (with the trustee) through spies of proper age and appearance, under some pretexts, and then ask him to restore it.
iast: sākṣiabhāve praṇidhibhirvayorūpasamanvitaiḥ apadeśaiśca saṃnyasya hiraṇyaṃ tasya tattvataḥ

sanskrit_iast: sa yadi pratipadyeta yathānyastaṃ yathākṛtam na tatra vidyate kiṃ cidyat parairabhiyujyate
meaning: स यदि प्रतिपद्येत यथान्यस्तं यथाकृतम् न तत्र विद्यते किं चिद्यत् परैरभियुज्यते
text: If he admits the deposit exactly in the form and shape in which it was entrusted,—then there is nothing in the charge brought against him by others.
iast: sa yadi pratipadyeta yathānyastaṃ yathākṛtam na tatra vidyate kiṃ cidyat parairabhiyujyate

sanskrit_iast: teṣāṃ na dadyādyadi tu taddhiraṇyaṃ yathāvidhi ubhau nigṛhya dāpyaḥ syāditi dharmasya dhāraṇā sa nigṛhyaubhayaṃ dāpya iti dharmasya dhāraṇā
meaning: तेषां न दद्याद्यदि तु तद्धिरण्यं यथाविधि उभौ निगृह्य दाप्यः स्यादिति धर्मस्य धारणा स निगृह्यौभयं दाप्य इति धर्मस्य धारणा
text: If, however, he should not restore that gold to them in the proper manner, he should be forced to restore both; such is the decree of the law.
iast: teṣāṃ na dadyādyadi tu taddhiraṇyaṃ yathāvidhi ubhau nigṛhya dāpyaḥ syāditi dharmasya dhāraṇā sa nigṛhyaubhayaṃ dāpya iti dharmasya dhāraṇā

sanskrit_iast: nikṣepaupanidhī nityaṃ na deyau pratyanantare naśyato vinipāte tāvanipāte tvanāśinau
meaning: निक्षेपौपनिधी नित्यं न देयौ प्रत्यनन्तरे नश्यतो विनिपाते तावनिपाते त्वनाशिनौ
text: Deposits, open and sealed, should never be handed over to the next-of-kin; in the event of a mishap occurring, they become lost; though they do not become lost, if no mishap occurs.
iast: nikṣepaupanidhī nityaṃ na deyau pratyanantare naśyato vinipāte tāvanipāte tvanāśinau

sanskrit_iast: svayameva tu yau dadyān mṛtasya pratyanantare na sa rājñā 'bhiyoktavyo na nikṣeptuśca bandhubhiḥ
meaning: स्वयमेव तु यौ दद्यान् मृतस्य प्रत्यनन्तरे न स राज्ञा 'भियोक्तव्यो न निक्षेप्तुश्च बन्धुभिः
text: If the man restores it himself to the next-of-kin of the deceased depositor,—he should not be harassed by the king, or by the depositor’s relatives.
iast: svayameva tu yau dadyān mṛtasya pratyanantare na sa rājñā 'bhiyoktavyo na nikṣeptuśca bandhubhiḥ

sanskrit_iast: acchalenaiva cānvicchet tamarthaṃ prītipūrvakam vicārya tasya vā vṛttaṃ sāmnaiva parisādhayet
meaning: अच्छलेनैव चान्विच्छेत् तमर्थं प्रीतिपूर्वकम् विचार्य तस्य वा वृत्तं साम्नैव परिसाधयेत्
text: In doubtful cases he should try to obtain it without artifice and in a friendly manner; or having ascertained his character, he should settle the matter by gentle means.
iast: acchalenaiva cānvicchet tamarthaṃ prītipūrvakam vicārya tasya vā vṛttaṃ sāmnaiva parisādhayet

sanskrit_iast: nikṣepeṣveṣu sarveṣu vidhiḥ syāt parisādhane samudre nāpnuyāt kiṃ cidyadi tasmānna saṃharet
meaning: निक्षेपेष्वेषु सर्वेषु विधिः स्यात् परिसाधने समुद्रे नाप्नुयात् किं चिद्यदि तस्मान्न संहरेत्
text: In the case of all deposits, such should be the method of restoration; but in the case of a sealed deposit, he should incur nothing, if he does not extract anything from it.
iast: nikṣepeṣveṣu sarveṣu vidhiḥ syāt parisādhane samudre nāpnuyāt kiṃ cidyadi tasmānna saṃharet

sanskrit_iast: caurairhṛtaṃ jalenauḍhamagninā dagdhameva vā na dadyādyadi tasmāt sa na saṃharati kiṃ cana
meaning: चौरैर्हृतं जलेनौढमग्निना दग्धमेव वा न दद्याद्यदि तस्मात् स न संहरति किं चन
text: The depositary shall not hake good what has been stolen by thieves, or carried away by water, or burnt,—if he does not extract anything from it.
iast: caurairhṛtaṃ jalenauḍhamagninā dagdhameva vā na dadyādyadi tasmāt sa na saṃharati kiṃ cana

sanskrit_iast: nikṣepasyāpahartāramanikṣeptārameva ca sarvairupāyairanvicchetśapathaiścaiva vaidikaiḥ
meaning: निक्षेपस्यापहर्तारमनिक्षेप्तारमेव च सर्वैरुपायैरन्विच्छेत्शपथैश्चैव वैदिकैः
text: The appropriator of a deposit, as also one who has not deposited anything (and yet asks for it),—the king shall test by all methods, as also by means of oaths and ordeals prescribed in the scriptures.
iast: nikṣepasyāpahartāramanikṣeptārameva ca sarvairupāyairanvicchetśapathaiścaiva vaidikaiḥ

sanskrit_iast: yo nikṣepaṃ nārpayati yaścānikṣipya yācate tāvubhau cauravatśāsyau dāpyau vā tatsamaṃ damam
meaning: यो निक्षेपं नार्पयति यश्चानिक्षिप्य याचते तावुभौ चौरवत्शास्यौ दाप्यौ वा तत्समं दमम्
text: He who does not restore a deposit, and he who, without having made any deposit, asks for it,—both of these should be punished like thieves, or be made to pay a fine equal in value.
iast: yo nikṣepaṃ nārpayati yaścānikṣipya yācate tāvubhau cauravatśāsyau dāpyau vā tatsamaṃ damam

sanskrit_iast: nikṣepasyāpahartāraṃ tatsamaṃ dāpayeddamam tathaupanidhihartāramaviśeṣeṇa pārthivaḥ
meaning: निक्षेपस्यापहर्तारं तत्समं दापयेद्दमम् तथौपनिधिहर्तारमविशेषेण पार्थिवः
text: In all cases the king shall make the appropriator of a deposit pay a fine equal in value to it; also the appropriator of a friendly loan.
iast: nikṣepasyāpahartāraṃ tatsamaṃ dāpayeddamam tathaupanidhihartāramaviśeṣeṇa pārthivaḥ

sanskrit_iast: upadhābhiśca yaḥ kaścit paradravyaṃ harennaraḥ sasahāyaḥ sa hantavyaḥ prakāśaṃ vividhairvadhaiḥ
meaning: उपधाभिश्च यः कश्चित् परद्रव्यं हरेन्नरः ससहायः स हन्तव्यः प्रकाशं विविधैर्वधैः
text: The man who may appropriate, by fraudulent means, the property of another person, should be punished publicly, along with his accomplices, with various modes of death.
iast: upadhābhiśca yaḥ kaścit paradravyaṃ harennaraḥ sasahāyaḥ sa hantavyaḥ prakāśaṃ vividhairvadhaiḥ

sanskrit_iast: nikṣepo yaḥ kṛto yena yāvāṃśca kulasaṃnidhau tāvāneva sa vijñeyo vibruvan daṇḍamarhati
meaning: निक्षेपो यः कृतो येन यावांश्च कुलसंनिधौ तावानेव स विज्ञेयो विब्रुवन् दण्डमर्हति
text: As much of a certain deposit has been entrusted in the presence of a number of men—so much should it be decided to be; the party misrepresenting it becomes liable to punishment.
iast: nikṣepo yaḥ kṛto yena yāvāṃśca kulasaṃnidhau tāvāneva sa vijñeyo vibruvan daṇḍamarhati

sanskrit_iast: mitho dāyaḥ kṛto yena gṛhīto mitha eva vā mitha eva pradātavyo yathā dāyastathā grahaḥ
meaning: मिथो दायः कृतो येन गृहीतो मिथ एव वा मिथ एव प्रदातव्यो यथा दायस्तथा ग्रहः
text: When a trust has been created privately and accepted also privately, then it should be restored also secretly: as the delivery so the restoration.
iast: mitho dāyaḥ kṛto yena gṛhīto mitha eva vā mitha eva pradātavyo yathā dāyastathā grahaḥ

sanskrit_iast: nikṣiptasya dhanasyaivaṃ prītyaupanihitasya ca rājā vinirṇayaṃ kuryādakṣiṇvannyāsadhāriṇam
meaning: निक्षिप्तस्य धनस्यैवं प्रीत्यौपनिहितस्य च राजा विनिर्णयं कुर्यादक्षिण्वन्न्यासधारिणम्
text: Thus shall the king come to a decision regarding property given as ‘deposit’ and that which is given as ‘friendly loan,’—without causing any injury to the keeper of the deposit.
iast: nikṣiptasya dhanasyaivaṃ prītyaupanihitasya ca rājā vinirṇayaṃ kuryādakṣiṇvannyāsadhāriṇam

sanskrit_iast: vikrīṇīte parasya svaṃ yo 'svāmī svāmyasammataḥ na taṃ nayeta sākṣyaṃ tu stenamastenamāninam
meaning: विक्रीणीते परस्य स्वं यो 'स्वामी स्वाम्यसम्मतः न तं नयेत साक्ष्यं तु स्तेनमस्तेनमानिनम्
text: If a man sells another man’s property, without being its owner, and without the owner’s consent, the judge shall not admit him as a witness,—he being a thief; though he may not be regarded as a thief.
iast: vikrīṇīte parasya svaṃ yo 'svāmī svāmyasammataḥ na taṃ nayeta sākṣyaṃ tu stenamastenamāninam

sanskrit_iast: avahāryo bhavetcaiva sānvayaḥ ṣaṭśataṃ damam nir 'nvayo 'napasaraḥ prāptaḥ syāccaurakilbiṣam
meaning: अवहार्यो भवेत्चैव सान्वयः षट्शतं दमम् निर् 'न्वयो 'नपसरः प्राप्तः स्याच्चौरकिल्बिषम्
text: If a relative, he shall be made to pay the penalty of six hundred; if he is not a relative, nor one having access to him, he shall incur the guilt of theft (specially).
iast: avahāryo bhavetcaiva sānvayaḥ ṣaṭśataṃ damam nir 'nvayo 'napasaraḥ prāptaḥ syāccaurakilbiṣam

sanskrit_iast: asvāminā kṛto yastu dāyo vikraya eva vā akṛtaḥ sa tu vijñeyo vyavahāre yathā sthitiḥ
meaning: अस्वामिना कृतो यस्तु दायो विक्रय एव वा अकृतः स तु विज्ञेयो व्यवहारे यथा स्थितिः
text: If a gift or sale is made by one who is not the owner, it should be held to be as not-made,—such being the rule of judicial proceedings.
iast: asvāminā kṛto yastu dāyo vikraya eva vā akṛtaḥ sa tu vijñeyo vyavahāre yathā sthitiḥ

sanskrit_iast: saṃbhogo dṛśyate yatra na dṛśyetāgamaḥ kva cit āgamaḥ kāraṇaṃ tatra na saṃbhoga iti sthitiḥ
meaning: संभोगो दृश्यते यत्र न दृश्येतागमः क्व चित् आगमः कारणं तत्र न संभोग इति स्थितिः
text: Where possession is evident, but no sort of title is perceptible, there title, and not possession, shall be the proof; such is the settled rule.
iast: saṃbhogo dṛśyate yatra na dṛśyetāgamaḥ kva cit āgamaḥ kāraṇaṃ tatra na saṃbhoga iti sthitiḥ

sanskrit_iast: vikrayādyo dhanaṃ kiṃ cidgṛhṇīyat kulasaṃnidhau krayeṇa sa viśuddhaṃ hi nyāyato labhate dhanam
meaning: विक्रयाद्यो धनं किं चिद्गृह्णीयत् कुलसंनिधौ क्रयेण स विशुद्धं हि न्यायतो लभते धनम्
text: If a man obtains a property from the market, in the presence of witnesses, he acquires that property with a clear title obtained by legal purchase.
iast: vikrayādyo dhanaṃ kiṃ cidgṛhṇīyat kulasaṃnidhau krayeṇa sa viśuddhaṃ hi nyāyato labhate dhanam

sanskrit_iast: atha mūlamanāhāryaṃ prakāśakrayaśodhitaḥ adaṇḍyo mucyate rājñā nāṣṭiko labhate dhanam
meaning: अथ मूलमनाहार्यं प्रकाशक्रयशोधितः अदण्ड्यो मुच्यते राज्ञा नाष्टिको लभते धनम्
text: If the source cannot be traced, the person (buyer), whose conduct has been cleared by the fact of the sale being public, is let off without punishment, but the man who lost the property shall receive it back.
iast: atha mūlamanāhāryaṃ prakāśakrayaśodhitaḥ adaṇḍyo mucyate rājñā nāṣṭiko labhate dhanam

sanskrit_iast: nānyadanyena saṃsṛṣṭarūpaṃ vikrayamarhati na cāsāraṃ na ca nyūnaṃ na dūreṇa tirohitam na sāvadyaṃ na ca nyūnaṃ na dūre na tirohitaṃ
meaning: नान्यदन्येन संसृष्टरूपं विक्रयमर्हति न चासारं न च न्यूनं न दूरेण तिरोहितम् न सावद्यं न च न्यूनं न दूरे न तिरोहितं
text: Any commodity that is mixed up with another should not be sold; nor what is without substance, nor what is deficient, nor what is at a distance, nor what is concealed.
iast: nānyadanyena saṃsṛṣṭarūpaṃ vikrayamarhati na cāsāraṃ na ca nyūnaṃ na dūreṇa tirohitam na sāvadyaṃ na ca nyūnaṃ na dūre na tirohitaṃ

sanskrit_iast: anyāṃ ceddarśayitvā 'nyā voḍhuḥ kanyā pradīyate ubhe ta ekaśulkena vahedityabravīn manuḥ
meaning: अन्यां चेद्दर्शयित्वा 'न्या वोढुः कन्या प्रदीयते उभे त एकशुल्केन वहेदित्यब्रवीन् मनुः
text: After one damsel has been shown, if another be given to the bridegroom, then he should marry both of them for the same single price,—so Manu has ordained.
iast: anyāṃ ceddarśayitvā 'nyā voḍhuḥ kanyā pradīyate ubhe ta ekaśulkena vahedityabravīn manuḥ

sanskrit_iast: naunmattāyā na kuṣṭhinyā na ca yā spṛṣṭamaithunā pūrvaṃ doṣānabhikhyāpya pradātā daṇḍamarhati
meaning: नौन्मत्ताया न कुष्ठिन्या न च या स्पृष्टमैथुना पूर्वं दोषानभिख्याप्य प्रदाता दण्डमर्हति
text: The giver, of a girl who is insane or leprous or has suffered copulation, does not deserve punishment, if he has previously declared her defects.
iast: naunmattāyā na kuṣṭhinyā na ca yā spṛṣṭamaithunā pūrvaṃ doṣānabhikhyāpya pradātā daṇḍamarhati

sanskrit_iast: ṛtvig yadi vṛto yajñe svakarma parihāpayet tasya karmānurūpeṇa deyo 'ṃśaḥ sahakartṛbhiḥ
meaning: ऋत्विग् यदि वृतो यज्ञे स्वकर्म परिहापयेत् तस्य कर्मानुरूपेण देयो 'ंशः सहकर्तृभिः
text: If a priest appointed at a sacrifice abandons his work, his associates shall pay him only such share as may be in keeping with the work actually done by him.
iast: ṛtvig yadi vṛto yajñe svakarma parihāpayet tasya karmānurūpeṇa deyo 'ṃśaḥ sahakartṛbhiḥ

sanskrit_iast: dakṣiṇāsu ca dattāsu svakarma parihāpayan kṛtsnameva labhetāṃśamanyenaiva ca kārayet
meaning: दक्षिणासु च दत्तासु स्वकर्म परिहापयन् कृत्स्नमेव लभेतांशमन्येनैव च कारयेत्
text: He who abandons his work after the fees have been paid, should receive his full share; and the work should be got done by another.
iast: dakṣiṇāsu ca dattāsu svakarma parihāpayan kṛtsnameva labhetāṃśamanyenaiva ca kārayet

sanskrit_iast: yasmin karmaṇi yāstu syuruktāḥ pratyaṅgadakṣiṇāḥ sa eva tā ādidīta bhajeran sarva eva vā
meaning: यस्मिन् कर्मणि यास्तु स्युरुक्ताः प्रत्यङ्गदक्षिणाः स एव ता आदिदीत भजेरन् सर्व एव वा
text: In connection with a rite, when specific fees are prescribed for its several parts,—will one man take all these, or shall they all share them?
iast: yasmin karmaṇi yāstu syuruktāḥ pratyaṅgadakṣiṇāḥ sa eva tā ādidīta bhajeran sarva eva vā

sanskrit_iast: rathaṃ haret cādhvaryurbrahmā 'dhāne ca vājinam hotā vā 'pi haredaśvamudgātā cāpyanaḥ kraye
meaning: रथं हरेत् चाध्वर्युर्ब्रह्मा 'धाने च वाजिनम् होता वा 'पि हरेदश्वमुद्गाता चाप्यनः क्रये
text: At Fire-laying, the Adhvaryu shall take the chariot, and the Brahman the horse; or the Hotṛ shall take the house: and the Udgātṛ shall take the cart at the Soma-purchase.
iast: rathaṃ haret cādhvaryurbrahmā 'dhāne ca vājinam hotā vā 'pi haredaśvamudgātā cāpyanaḥ kraye

sanskrit_iast: sarveṣāmardhino mukhyāstadardhenārdhino 'pare tṛtīyinastṛtīyāṃśāścaturthāṃśāśca pādinaḥ
meaning: सर्वेषामर्धिनो मुख्यास्तदर्धेनार्धिनो 'परे तृतीयिनस्तृतीयांशाश्चतुर्थांशाश्च पादिनः
text: From among all, the chief men shall receive half; the next shall receive half of that; the ‘thirders’ the third part and the ‘fourthers’ the fourth part of it.
iast: sarveṣāmardhino mukhyāstadardhenārdhino 'pare tṛtīyinastṛtīyāṃśāścaturthāṃśāśca pādinaḥ

sanskrit_iast: saṃbhūya svāni karmāṇi kurvadbhiriha mānavaiḥ anena vidhiyogena kartavyā 'ṃśaprakalpanā
meaning: संभूय स्वानि कर्माणि कुर्वद्भिरिह मानवैः अनेन विधियोगेन कर्तव्या 'ंशप्रकल्पना
text: Among men carrying on their business jointly, the allotment of shares should be done by the application of these principles.
iast: saṃbhūya svāni karmāṇi kurvadbhiriha mānavaiḥ anena vidhiyogena kartavyā 'ṃśaprakalpanā

sanskrit_iast: dharmārthaṃ yena dattaṃ syāt kasmai cidyācate dhanam paścācca na tathā tat syānna deyaṃ tasya tadbhavet
meaning: धर्मार्थं येन दत्तं स्यात् कस्मै चिद्याचते धनम् पश्चाच्च न तथा तत् स्यान्न देयं तस्य तद्भवेत्
text: When a man gives money, for a pious purpose, to another who asks for it,—if, subsequently, it is not used for that purpose, then, it shall not be given to him.
iast: dharmārthaṃ yena dattaṃ syāt kasmai cidyācate dhanam paścācca na tathā tat syānna deyaṃ tasya tadbhavet

sanskrit_iast: yadi saṃsādhayet tat tu darpātlobhena vā punaḥ rājñā dāpyaḥ suvarṇaṃ syāt tasya steyasya niṣkṛtiḥ
meaning: यदि संसाधयेत् तत् तु दर्पात्लोभेन वा पुनः राज्ञा दाप्यः सुवर्णं स्यात् तस्य स्तेयस्य निष्कृतिः
text: If, through arrogance or greed, the man should seek to recover it, he should be made by the King to pay one gold-piece, as an expiation for that theft.
iast: yadi saṃsādhayet tat tu darpātlobhena vā punaḥ rājñā dāpyaḥ suvarṇaṃ syāt tasya steyasya niṣkṛtiḥ

sanskrit_iast: dattasyaiṣauditā dharmyā yathāvadanapakriyā ata ūrdhvaṃ pravakṣyāmi vetanasyānapakriyām
meaning: दत्तस्यैषौदिता धर्म्या यथावदनपक्रिया अत ऊर्ध्वं प्रवक्ष्यामि वेतनस्यानपक्रियाम्
text: Thus has been fully explained the lawful non-misappropriation of gifts; after this I am going to describe the ‘non-misappropriation of Wages.’
iast: dattasyaiṣauditā dharmyā yathāvadanapakriyā ata ūrdhvaṃ pravakṣyāmi vetanasyānapakriyām

sanskrit_iast: bhṛto nārto na kuryādyo darpāt karma yathā 'uditam 'nārto sa daṇḍyaḥ kṛṣṇalānyaṣṭau na deyaṃ cāsya vetanam
meaning: भृतो नार्तो न कुर्याद्यो दर्पात् कर्म यथा 'उदितम् 'नार्तो स दण्ड्यः कृष्णलान्यष्टौ न देयं चास्य वेतनम्
text: If a hireling, without being ill, does not perform the stipulated work, through arrogance,—he should be fined eight ‘Kṛṣṇalas,’ and should not receive his wages.
iast: bhṛto nārto na kuryādyo darpāt karma yathā 'uditam 'nārto sa daṇḍyaḥ kṛṣṇalānyaṣṭau na deyaṃ cāsya vetanam

sanskrit_iast: ārtastu kuryāt svasthaḥ san yathābhāṣitamāditaḥ sa dīrghasyāpi kālasya tatlabheta(eva vetanam
meaning: आर्तस्तु कुर्यात् स्वस्थः सन् यथाभाषितमादितः स दीर्घस्यापि कालस्य तत्लभेत(एव वेतनम्
text: But if he is ill and on recovering, completes the work as originally stipulated, he shall receive his wages for it, even after a long time.
iast: ārtastu kuryāt svasthaḥ san yathābhāṣitamāditaḥ sa dīrghasyāpi kālasya tatlabheta(eva vetanam

sanskrit_iast: yathauktamārtaḥ sustho vā yastat karma na kārayet na tasya vetanaṃ deyamalpaunasyāpi karmaṇaḥ
meaning: यथौक्तमार्तः सुस्थो वा यस्तत् कर्म न कारयेत् न तस्य वेतनं देयमल्पौनस्यापि कर्मणः
text: When a man, sick or well, does not get the stipulated work done, he shall not receive hi s wages,—even though the work be only slightly incomplete.
iast: yathauktamārtaḥ sustho vā yastat karma na kārayet na tasya vetanaṃ deyamalpaunasyāpi karmaṇaḥ

sanskrit_iast: eṣa dharmo 'khilenaukto vetanādānakarmaṇaḥ ata ūrdhvaṃ pravakṣyāmi dharmaṃ samayabhedinām
meaning: एष धर्मो 'खिलेनौक्तो वेतनादानकर्मणः अत ऊर्ध्वं प्रवक्ष्यामि धर्मं समयभेदिनाम्
text: Thus has the entire law bearing upon the action of ‘Non-payment of Wages’ been explained. After this I am going to expound the law relating to Contract-breakers.
iast: eṣa dharmo 'khilenaukto vetanādānakarmaṇaḥ ata ūrdhvaṃ pravakṣyāmi dharmaṃ samayabhedinām

sanskrit_iast: yo grāmadeśasaṅghānāṃ kṛtvā satyena saṃvidam visaṃvadennaro lobhāt taṃ rāṣṭrādvipravāsayet
meaning: यो ग्रामदेशसङ्घानां कृत्वा सत्येन संविदम् विसंवदेन्नरो लोभात् तं राष्ट्राद्विप्रवासयेत्
text: If a man, after having entered into a compact under oath with a village, a country or a confederation, should break it, through greed,—him the king shall banish from his kingdom.
iast: yo grāmadeśasaṅghānāṃ kṛtvā satyena saṃvidam visaṃvadennaro lobhāt taṃ rāṣṭrādvipravāsayet

sanskrit_iast: nigṛhya dāpayeccainaṃ samayavyabhicāriṇam catuḥsuvarṇān ṣaṇniṣkāṃśśatamānaṃ ca rājakam
meaning: निगृह्य दापयेच्चैनं समयव्यभिचारिणम् चतुःसुवर्णान् षण्निष्कांश्शतमानं च राजकम्
text: Having caught such a breaker of compact, he shall make him pay six ‘niṣkas’ of four ‘suvarṇas’ each, and also one silver ‘śatamāna.’
iast: nigṛhya dāpayeccainaṃ samayavyabhicāriṇam catuḥsuvarṇān ṣaṇniṣkāṃśśatamānaṃ ca rājakam

sanskrit_iast: etaddaṇḍavidhiṃ kuryāddhārmikaḥ pṛthivīpatiḥ grāmajātisamūheṣu samayavyabhicāriṇām
meaning: एतद्दण्डविधिं कुर्याद्धार्मिकः पृथिवीपतिः ग्रामजातिसमूहेषु समयव्यभिचारिणाम्
text: This is the law of punishment which the king shall follow in the case of the breakers of compacts relating to villages and caste-federations.
iast: etaddaṇḍavidhiṃ kuryāddhārmikaḥ pṛthivīpatiḥ grāmajātisamūheṣu samayavyabhicāriṇām

sanskrit_iast: krītvā vikrīya vā kiṃ cidyasyaihānuśayo bhavet so 'ntardaśāhāt taddravyaṃ dadyāccaivādadīta vā
meaning: क्रीत्वा विक्रीय वा किं चिद्यस्यैहानुशयो भवेत् सो 'न्तर्दशाहात् तद्द्रव्यं दद्याच्चैवाददीत वा
text: If, after having bought or sold anything, one should repent of it, he may return or take back that thing within ten days.
iast: krītvā vikrīya vā kiṃ cidyasyaihānuśayo bhavet so 'ntardaśāhāt taddravyaṃ dadyāccaivādadīta vā

sanskrit_iast: pareṇa tu daśāhasya na dadyānnāpi dāpayet ādadāno dadat caiva rājñā daṇḍyau śatāni ṣaṭ
meaning: परेण तु दशाहस्य न दद्यान्नापि दापयेत् आददानो ददत् चैव राज्ञा दण्ड्यौ शतानि षट्
text: But after ten days, he shall neither return nor take it back; he who takes it back, as well as he who returns it, should be fined by the king six hundred.
iast: pareṇa tu daśāhasya na dadyānnāpi dāpayet ādadāno dadat caiva rājñā daṇḍyau śatāni ṣaṭ

sanskrit_iast: yastu doṣavatīṃ kanyāmanākhyāya prayacchati tasya kuryānnṛpo daṇḍaṃ svayaṃ ṣaṇṇavatiṃ paṇān
meaning: यस्तु दोषवतीं कन्यामनाख्याय प्रयच्छति तस्य कुर्यान्नृपो दण्डं स्वयं षण्णवतिं पणान्
text: If a man gives a defective damsel, without mentioning the defects, he should be punished by the king himself with a fine of ninety-six ‘paṇas.’
iast: yastu doṣavatīṃ kanyāmanākhyāya prayacchati tasya kuryānnṛpo daṇḍaṃ svayaṃ ṣaṇṇavatiṃ paṇān

sanskrit_iast: akanyaiti tu yaḥ kanyāṃ brūyāddveṣeṇa mānavaḥ sa śataṃ prāpnuyāddaṇḍaṃ tasyā doṣamadarśayan
meaning: अकन्यैति तु यः कन्यां ब्रूयाद्द्वेषेण मानवः स शतं प्राप्नुयाद्दण्डं तस्या दोषमदर्शयन्
text: If a man, through malice, speaks of a maiden as ‘not a virgin’ he should receive the punishment of one hundred, if unable to prove her impurity.
iast: akanyaiti tu yaḥ kanyāṃ brūyāddveṣeṇa mānavaḥ sa śataṃ prāpnuyāddaṇḍaṃ tasyā doṣamadarśayan

sanskrit_iast: pāṇigrahaṇikā mantrāḥ kanyāsveva pratiṣṭhitāḥ nākanyāsu kva cinnr̥̄ṇāṃ luptadharmakriyā hi tāḥ
meaning: पाणिग्रहणिका मन्त्राः कन्यास्वेव प्रतिष्ठिताः नाकन्यासु क्व चिन्न्र्̥̄णां लुप्तधर्मक्रिया हि ताः
text: The marriage-ritual texts are applicable to virgins only, and nowhere among men, to non-virgins; and this because these latter are excluded from religious acts.
iast: pāṇigrahaṇikā mantrāḥ kanyāsveva pratiṣṭhitāḥ nākanyāsu kva cinnr̥̄ṇāṃ luptadharmakriyā hi tāḥ

sanskrit_iast: pāṇigrahaṇikā mantrā niyataṃ dāralakṣaṇam teṣāṃ niṣṭhā tu vijñeyā vidvadbhiḥ saptame pade
meaning: पाणिग्रहणिका मन्त्रा नियतं दारलक्षणम् तेषां निष्ठा तु विज्ञेया विद्वद्भिः सप्तमे पदे
text: The marriage -texts are clearly conducive to ‘wife-hood’; and these are to be recognised by the learned as completed at the ‘seventh-step.’
iast: pāṇigrahaṇikā mantrā niyataṃ dāralakṣaṇam teṣāṃ niṣṭhā tu vijñeyā vidvadbhiḥ saptame pade

sanskrit_iast: yasmin yasmin kṛte kārye yasyaihānuśayo bhavet tamanena vidhānena dharmye pathi niveśayet
meaning: यस्मिन् यस्मिन् कृते कार्ये यस्यैहानुशयो भवेत् तमनेन विधानेन धर्म्ये पथि निवेशयेत्
text: Whenever any person should have repentance in regard to any compact that has been entered into—the king shall bring him to the righteous path, in the manner just described.
iast: yasmin yasmin kṛte kārye yasyaihānuśayo bhavet tamanena vidhānena dharmye pathi niveśayet

sanskrit_iast: paśuṣu svāmināṃ caiva pālānāṃ ca vyatikrame vivādaṃ saṃpravakṣyāmi yathāvaddharmatattvataḥ
meaning: पशुषु स्वामिनां चैव पालानां च व्यतिक्रमे विवादं संप्रवक्ष्यामि यथावद्धर्मतत्त्वतः
text: I am going to expound fully the true law relating to disputes between owners and keepers arising from transgressions regarding cattle.
iast: paśuṣu svāmināṃ caiva pālānāṃ ca vyatikrame vivādaṃ saṃpravakṣyāmi yathāvaddharmatattvataḥ

sanskrit_iast: divā vaktavyatā pāle rātrau svāmini tadgṛhe yogakṣeme 'nyathā cet tu pālo vaktavyatāmiyāt
meaning: दिवा वक्तव्यता पाले रात्रौ स्वामिनि तद्गृहे योगक्षेमे 'न्यथा चेत् तु पालो वक्तव्यतामियात्
text: Responsibility for the safe keeping during the day rests with the keeper, and during the night, with the owner, ip in his own house; if otherwise, the keeper should be responsible.
iast: divā vaktavyatā pāle rātrau svāmini tadgṛhe yogakṣeme 'nyathā cet tu pālo vaktavyatāmiyāt

sanskrit_iast: gopaḥ kṣīrabhṛto yastu sa duhyāddaśato varām gosvāmyanumate bhṛtyaḥ sā syāt pāle 'bhṛte bhṛtiḥ
meaning: गोपः क्षीरभृतो यस्तु स दुह्याद्दशतो वराम् गोस्वाम्यनुमते भृत्यः सा स्यात् पाले 'भृते भृतिः
text: If the hired cattle-keeper is one paid with milk, he shall, with the owner’s permission, milk the best out of ten; this shall be the ‘wages’ of the keeper, if he receives no other wages.
iast: gopaḥ kṣīrabhṛto yastu sa duhyāddaśato varām gosvāmyanumate bhṛtyaḥ sā syāt pāle 'bhṛte bhṛtiḥ

sanskrit_iast: naṣṭaṃ vinaṣṭaṃ kṛmibhiḥ śvahataṃ viṣame mṛtam hīnaṃ puruṣakāreṇa pradadyāt pāla eva tu
meaning: नष्टं विनष्टं कृमिभिः श्वहतं विषमे मृतम् हीनं पुरुषकारेण प्रदद्यात् पाल एव तु
text: The keeper alone should make good what has strayed, or been destroyed by worms, or killed by dogs, or has perished in an unsafe place,—if it was left without human aid.
iast: naṣṭaṃ vinaṣṭaṃ kṛmibhiḥ śvahataṃ viṣame mṛtam hīnaṃ puruṣakāreṇa pradadyāt pāla eva tu

sanskrit_iast: vighuṣya tu hṛtaṃ caurairna pālo dātumarhati yadi deśe ca kāle ca svāminaḥ svasya śaṃsati
meaning: विघुष्य तु हृतं चौरैर्न पालो दातुमर्हति यदि देशे च काले च स्वामिनः स्वस्य शंसति
text: But the keeper shall not have to make good what has been taken away by thieves openly,—if he informs his own master of it at the proper place and time.
iast: vighuṣya tu hṛtaṃ caurairna pālo dātumarhati yadi deśe ca kāle ca svāminaḥ svasya śaṃsati

sanskrit_iast: karṇau carma ca vālāṃśca bastiṃ snāyuṃ ca rocanām paśuṣu svāmināṃ dadyān mṛteṣvaṅkāni darśayet 'ṅkāṃśca darśayet
meaning: कर्णौ चर्म च वालांश्च बस्तिं स्नायुं च रोचनाम् पशुषु स्वामिनां दद्यान् मृतेष्वङ्कानि दर्शयेत् 'ङ्कांश्च दर्शयेत्
text: On the death of the animals, he shall make over to the owner their ears, skin, tail-hairs, bladder and tendons and the concrete bile, and also point out their marks.
iast: karṇau carma ca vālāṃśca bastiṃ snāyuṃ ca rocanām paśuṣu svāmināṃ dadyān mṛteṣvaṅkāni darśayet 'ṅkāṃśca darśayet

sanskrit_iast: ajāvike tu saṃruddhe vṛkaiḥ pāle tvanāyati yāṃ prasahya vṛko hanyāt pāle tat kilbiṣaṃ bhavet
meaning: अजाविके तु संरुद्धे वृकैः पाले त्वनायति यां प्रसह्य वृको हन्यात् पाले तत् किल्बिषं भवेत्
text: When goats and sheep have been surrounded by wolves, and the keeper does not come for ward,—if the wolf forcibly kill any, the blame shall lie with the keeper.
iast: ajāvike tu saṃruddhe vṛkaiḥ pāle tvanāyati yāṃ prasahya vṛko hanyāt pāle tat kilbiṣaṃ bhavet

sanskrit_iast: tāsāṃ cedavaruddhānāṃ carantīnāṃ mitho vane yāmutplutya vṛko hanyānna pālastatra kilbiṣī
meaning: तासां चेदवरुद्धानां चरन्तीनां मिथो वने यामुत्प्लुत्य वृको हन्यान्न पालस्तत्र किल्बिषी
text: When however, they are grazing together in the forest, duly protected,—if a wolf pounces upon one and kills it,—the keeper is not to blame.
iast: tāsāṃ cedavaruddhānāṃ carantīnāṃ mitho vane yāmutplutya vṛko hanyānna pālastatra kilbiṣī

sanskrit_iast: dhanuḥśataṃ parīhāro grāmasya syāt samantataḥ śamyāpātāstrayo vā 'pi triguṇo nagarasya tu
meaning: धनुःशतं परीहारो ग्रामस्य स्यात् समन्ततः शम्यापातास्त्रयो वा 'पि त्रिगुणो नगरस्य तु
text: Around the village there should be a pasture-ground, four hundred ‘bows’ or three ‘stick-throws’ (in width); but three times that space around the town.
iast: dhanuḥśataṃ parīhāro grāmasya syāt samantataḥ śamyāpātāstrayo vā 'pi triguṇo nagarasya tu

sanskrit_iast: tatrāparivṛtaṃ dhānyaṃ vihiṃsyuḥ paśavo yadi na tatra praṇayeddaṇḍaṃ nṛpatiḥ paśurakṣiṇām
meaning: तत्रापरिवृतं धान्यं विहिंस्युः पशवो यदि न तत्र प्रणयेद्दण्डं नृपतिः पशुरक्षिणाम्
text: If the cattle damage the unfenced crops therein, the king, in that case, shall not inflict punishment on the cattle-keepers.
iast: tatrāparivṛtaṃ dhānyaṃ vihiṃsyuḥ paśavo yadi na tatra praṇayeddaṇḍaṃ nṛpatiḥ paśurakṣiṇām

sanskrit_iast: vṛtiṃ tatra prakurvīta yāmuṣtro na vilokayet chidraṃ ca vārayet sarvaṃ śvasūkaramukhānugam
meaning: वृतिं तत्र प्रकुर्वीत यामुष्त्रो न विलोकयेत् छिद्रं च वारयेत् सर्वं श्वसूकरमुखानुगम्
text: One should set up an enclosure there which the camel cannot see, and shut up every opening through which the head of a dog ok a boar could be thrust.
iast: vṛtiṃ tatra prakurvīta yāmuṣtro na vilokayet chidraṃ ca vārayet sarvaṃ śvasūkaramukhānugam

sanskrit_iast: pathi kṣetre parivṛte grāmāntīye 'tha vā punaḥ sapālaḥ śatadaṇḍārho vipālān vārayet paśūn
meaning: पथि क्षेत्रे परिवृते ग्रामान्तीये 'थ वा पुनः सपालः शतदण्डार्हो विपालान् वारयेत् पशून्
text: If cattle attended by the keeper be found in an enclosed field, on the road-side or near the village, the keeper should be fined a hundred; but cattle without a keeper shall be driven off.
iast: pathi kṣetre parivṛte grāmāntīye 'tha vā punaḥ sapālaḥ śatadaṇḍārho vipālān vārayet paśūn

sanskrit_iast: kṣetreṣvanyeṣu tu paśuḥ sapādaṃ paṇamarhati sarvatra tu sado deyaḥ kṣetrikasyaiti dhāraṇā
meaning: क्षेत्रेष्वन्येषु तु पशुः सपादं पणमर्हति सर्वत्र तु सदो देयः क्षेत्रिकस्यैति धारणा
text: In the case of other fields, the cattle-keeper should be fined a ‘paṇa’ and a quarter; and in all cases the crop shall be made good to the owner of the field; such is the established rule.
iast: kṣetreṣvanyeṣu tu paśuḥ sapādaṃ paṇamarhati sarvatra tu sado deyaḥ kṣetrikasyaiti dhāraṇā

sanskrit_iast: anirdaśāhāṃ gāṃ sūtāṃ vṛṣān devapaśūṃstathā sapālān vā vipālān vā na daṇḍyān manurabravīt
meaning: अनिर्दशाहां गां सूतां वृषान् देवपशूंस्तथा सपालान् वा विपालान् वा न दण्ड्यान् मनुरब्रवीत्
text: But Manu has declared that no punishment shall be inflicted upon a cow within ten days of its calving, or bulls or dedicated cattle,—whether with or without keepers.
iast: anirdaśāhāṃ gāṃ sūtāṃ vṛṣān devapaśūṃstathā sapālān vā vipālān vā na daṇḍyān manurabravīt

sanskrit_iast: kṣetriyasyātyaye daṇḍo bhāgāddaśaguṇo bhavet kṣetrikasyātyaye tato 'rdhadaṇḍo bhṛtyānāmajñānāt kṣetrikasya tu
meaning: क्षेत्रियस्यात्यये दण्डो भागाद्दशगुणो भवेत् क्षेत्रिकस्यात्यये ततो 'र्धदण्डो भृत्यानामज्ञानात् क्षेत्रिकस्य तु
text: When there is transgression on the part of the farmer himself, his fine shall be ten times the royal share,—half of that in the case of servants, if it is unknown to the farmer.
iast: kṣetriyasyātyaye daṇḍo bhāgāddaśaguṇo bhavet kṣetrikasyātyaye tato 'rdhadaṇḍo bhṛtyānāmajñānāt kṣetrikasya tu

sanskrit_iast: etadvidhānamātiṣṭheddhārmikaḥ pṛthivīpatiḥ svāmināṃ ca paśūnāṃ ca pālānāṃ ca vyatikrame
meaning: एतद्विधानमातिष्ठेद्धार्मिकः पृथिवीपतिः स्वामिनां च पशूनां च पालानां च व्यतिक्रमे
text: This is the rule that the righteous king shall observe, in the case of transgressions by owners, by cattle and by the keepers.
iast: etadvidhānamātiṣṭheddhārmikaḥ pṛthivīpatiḥ svāmināṃ ca paśūnāṃ ca pālānāṃ ca vyatikrame

sanskrit_iast: sīmāṃ prati samutpanne vivāde grāmayordvayoḥ jyeṣṭhe māsi nayet sīmāṃ suprakāśeṣu setuṣu
meaning: सीमां प्रति समुत्पन्ने विवादे ग्रामयोर्द्वयोः ज्येष्ठे मासि नयेत् सीमां सुप्रकाशेषु सेतुषु
text: When a dispute regarding boundaries arises between two villages, the king shall settle the boundary during the month of Jyeṣṭha, when the landmarks are distinctly perceptible.
iast: sīmāṃ prati samutpanne vivāde grāmayordvayoḥ jyeṣṭhe māsi nayet sīmāṃ suprakāśeṣu setuṣu

sanskrit_iast: sīṃāvṛkṣāṃśca kurvīta nyagrodhāśvatthakiṃśukān śālmalīn sālatālāṃśca kṣīriṇaścaiva pādapān
meaning: सींआवृक्षांश्च कुर्वीत न्यग्रोधाश्वत्थकिंशुकान् शाल्मलीन् सालतालांश्च क्षीरिणश्चैव पादपान्
text: He shall plant boundary-trees,—such as the Nyagrodha, the Aśvattha, the Kiṃśuka, the Śālmalī, the Sāla and the Tāla,—as also plants with milky juice.
iast: sīṃāvṛkṣāṃśca kurvīta nyagrodhāśvatthakiṃśukān śālmalīn sālatālāṃśca kṣīriṇaścaiva pādapān

sanskrit_iast: gulmān veṇūṃśca vividhān śamīvallīsthalāni ca śarān kubjakagulmāṃśca tathā sīmā na naśyati
meaning: गुल्मान् वेणूंश्च विविधान् शमीवल्लीस्थलानि च शरान् कुब्जकगुल्मांश्च तथा सीमा न नश्यति
text: Also thickets, bamboos of various kinds, the Śamī-tree, creepers and mounds, reeds and Kubjaka thickets; trees shall not be obliterated.
iast: gulmān veṇūṃśca vividhān śamīvallīsthalāni ca śarān kubjakagulmāṃśca tathā sīmā na naśyati

sanskrit_iast: taḍāgānyudapānāni vāpyaḥ prasravaṇāni ca sīmāsaṃdhiṣu kāryāṇi devatāyatanāni ca
meaning: तडागान्युदपानानि वाप्यः प्रस्रवणानि च सीमासंधिषु कार्याणि देवतायतनानि च
text: Tanks, water-reservoirs, ponds and fountains should be built on boundary-links; as also temples.
iast: taḍāgānyudapānāni vāpyaḥ prasravaṇāni ca sīmāsaṃdhiṣu kāryāṇi devatāyatanāni ca

sanskrit_iast: upachannāni cānyāni sīmāliṅgāni kārayet sīmājñāne nṛṇāṃ vīkṣya nityaṃ loke viparyayam
meaning: उपछन्नानि चान्यानि सीमालिङ्गानि कारयेत् सीमाज्ञाने नृणां वीक्ष्य नित्यं लोके विपर्ययम्
text: He shall also set up hidden boundary-marks,—seeing that in the world there are constant trespasses, due to the ignorance of boundaries among men.
iast: upachannāni cānyāni sīmāliṅgāni kārayet sīmājñāne nṛṇāṃ vīkṣya nityaṃ loke viparyayam

sanskrit_iast: aśmano 'sthīni govālāṃstuṣān bhasma kapālikāḥ karīṣamiṣṭakā 'ṅgārāṃśśarkarā vālukāstathā
meaning: अश्मनो 'स्थीनि गोवालांस्तुषान् भस्म कपालिकाः करीषमिष्टका 'ङ्गारांश्शर्करा वालुकास्तथा
text: As also, stones, bones, cow’s hair, chaff, ashes, potsherds, dry cow dung, bricks, cinders, pebbles, and sand.
iast: aśmano 'sthīni govālāṃstuṣān bhasma kapālikāḥ karīṣamiṣṭakā 'ṅgārāṃśśarkarā vālukāstathā

sanskrit_iast: yāni caivaṃprakārāṇi kālādbhūmirna bhakṣayet tāni saṃdhiṣu sīmāyāmaprakāśāni kārayet sīmāyā
meaning: यानि चैवंप्रकाराणि कालाद्भूमिर्न भक्षयेत् तानि संधिषु सीमायामप्रकाशानि कारयेत् सीमाया
text: Other such-like things which the earth may not eat up in time,—these he shall secretly set up on junctions of boundaries.
iast: yāni caivaṃprakārāṇi kālādbhūmirna bhakṣayet tāni saṃdhiṣu sīmāyāmaprakāśāni kārayet sīmāyā

sanskrit_iast: etairliṅgairnayet sīmāṃ rājā vivadamānayoḥ pūrvabhuktyā ca satatamudakasyāgamena ca
meaning: एतैर्लिङ्गैर्नयेत् सीमां राजा विवदमानयोः पूर्वभुक्त्या च सततमुदकस्यागमेन च
text: By these signs shall the king determine the boundary between two contending parties; as also by long-continued possession and by flowing streams of water.
iast: etairliṅgairnayet sīmāṃ rājā vivadamānayoḥ pūrvabhuktyā ca satatamudakasyāgamena ca

sanskrit_iast: yadi sṃśaya eva syātliṅgānāmapi darśane sākṣipratyaya eva syāt sīmāvādavinirṇayaḥ sīmāvādaviniścayaḥ
meaning: यदि स्ंशय एव स्यात्लिङ्गानामपि दर्शने साक्षिप्रत्यय एव स्यात् सीमावादविनिर्णयः सीमावादविनिश्चयः
text: If, even on the inspection of the marks, there should be a doubt, the settlement of the dispute regarding boundaries shall be entirely dependent upon witnesses.
iast: yadi sṃśaya eva syātliṅgānāmapi darśane sākṣipratyaya eva syāt sīmāvādavinirṇayaḥ sīmāvādaviniścayaḥ

sanskrit_iast: grāmīyakakulānāṃ ca samakṣaṃ sīmni sākṣiṇaḥ grāmeyaka praṣṭavyāḥ sīmaliṅgāni tayoścaiva vivādinoḥ sīmāliṅgāni
meaning: ग्रामीयककुलानां च समक्षं सीम्नि साक्षिणः ग्रामेयक प्रष्टव्याः सीमलिङ्गानि तयोश्चैव विवादिनोः सीमालिङ्गानि
text: Witnesses regarding boundaries shall be questioned in regard to the boundary-marks, in the presence of an assembly of villagers and also of the two contending parties.
iast: grāmīyakakulānāṃ ca samakṣaṃ sīmni sākṣiṇaḥ grāmeyaka praṣṭavyāḥ sīmaliṅgāni tayoścaiva vivādinoḥ sīmāliṅgāni

sanskrit_iast: te pṛṣtāstu yathā brūyuḥ samastāḥ sīmni niścayam nibadhnīyāt tathā sīmāṃ sarvāṃstāṃścaiva nāmataḥ
meaning: ते पृष्तास्तु यथा ब्रूयुः समस्ताः सीम्नि निश्चयम् निबध्नीयात् तथा सीमां सर्वांस्तांश्चैव नामतः
text: The opinion that, on being questioned, they unanimously declare in regard to the boundary,—according to that he shall lay down the boundary, recording also the names of them all.
iast: te pṛṣtāstu yathā brūyuḥ samastāḥ sīmni niścayam nibadhnīyāt tathā sīmāṃ sarvāṃstāṃścaiva nāmataḥ

sanskrit_iast: śirobhiste gṛhītvaurvīṃ sragviṇo raktavāsasaḥ sukṛtaiḥ śāpithāḥ svaiḥ svairnayeyuste samañjasam
meaning: शिरोभिस्ते गृहीत्वौर्वीं स्रग्विणो रक्तवाससः सुकृतैः शापिथाः स्वैः स्वैर्नयेयुस्ते समञ्जसम्
text: Placing earth upon their heads, wearing garlands and red clothes, and being sworn by their respective meritorious deeds, they shall decide honestly.
iast: śirobhiste gṛhītvaurvīṃ sragviṇo raktavāsasaḥ sukṛtaiḥ śāpithāḥ svaiḥ svairnayeyuste samañjasam

sanskrit_iast: yathauktena nayantaste pūyante satyasākṣiṇaḥ viparītaṃ nayantastu dāpyāḥ syurdviśataṃ damam
meaning: यथौक्तेन नयन्तस्ते पूयन्ते सत्यसाक्षिणः विपरीतं नयन्तस्तु दाप्याः स्युर्द्विशतं दमम्
text: If they decide in the right manner, they, being truthful witnesses, become purified; but if they decide contrariwise, they should be made to pay a fine of two hundred.
iast: yathauktena nayantaste pūyante satyasākṣiṇaḥ viparītaṃ nayantastu dāpyāḥ syurdviśataṃ damam

sanskrit_iast: sākṣyabhāve tu catvāro grāmāḥ sāmantavāsinaḥ grāmasīmāntavāsinaḥ sīmāvinirṇayaṃ kuryuḥ prayatā rājasaṃnidhau
meaning: साक्ष्यभावे तु चत्वारो ग्रामाः सामन्तवासिनः ग्रामसीमान्तवासिनः सीमाविनिर्णयं कुर्युः प्रयता राजसंनिधौ
text: In the absence of witnesses four honest inhabitants of neighbouring villages shall make the determination of the boundary, in the presence of the king.
iast: sākṣyabhāve tu catvāro grāmāḥ sāmantavāsinaḥ grāmasīmāntavāsinaḥ sīmāvinirṇayaṃ kuryuḥ prayatā rājasaṃnidhau

sanskrit_iast: sāmantānāmabhāve tu maulānāṃ sīmni sākṣiṇām imānapyanuyuñjīta puruṣān vanagocarān
meaning: सामन्तानामभावे तु मौलानां सीम्नि साक्षिणाम् इमानप्यनुयुञ्जीत पुरुषान् वनगोचरान्
text: In the absence of such original inhabitants of neighbouring villages as could be witnesses in regard to the boundary, the king may examine these (following) frequenters of forests also.
iast: sāmantānāmabhāve tu maulānāṃ sīmni sākṣiṇām imānapyanuyuñjīta puruṣān vanagocarān

sanskrit_iast: vyādhāṃśākunikān gopān kaivartān mūlakhānakān vyālagrāhānuñchavṛttīnanyāṃśca vanacāriṇaḥ
meaning: व्याधांशाकुनिकान् गोपान् कैवर्तान् मूलखानकान् व्यालग्राहानुञ्छवृत्तीनन्यांश्च वनचारिणः
text: Hunters, Fowlers, Cowherds, Fishermen, Root-diggers, Snake-catchers, Gleaners and other Foresters.
iast: vyādhāṃśākunikān gopān kaivartān mūlakhānakān vyālagrāhānuñchavṛttīnanyāṃśca vanacāriṇaḥ

sanskrit_iast: te pṛṣṭāstu yathā brūyuḥ sīmāsaṃdhiṣu lakṣaṇam tat tathā sthāpayedrājā dharmeṇa grāmayordvayoḥ
meaning: ते पृष्टास्तु यथा ब्रूयुः सीमासंधिषु लक्षणम् तत् तथा स्थापयेद्राजा धर्मेण ग्रामयोर्द्वयोः
text: As they, on being questioned in fairness, declare the marks of boundary-lines between two villages, even so shall the king fix it.
iast: te pṛṣṭāstu yathā brūyuḥ sīmāsaṃdhiṣu lakṣaṇam tat tathā sthāpayedrājā dharmeṇa grāmayordvayoḥ

sanskrit_iast: kṣetrakūpataḍāgānāmārāmasya gṛhasya ca sāmantapratyayo jñeyaḥ sīmāsetuvinirṇayaḥ
meaning: क्षेत्रकूपतडागानामारामस्य गृहस्य च सामन्तप्रत्ययो ज्ञेयः सीमासेतुविनिर्णयः
text: In the case of fields, walls, tanks, gardens and houses, the decision regarding boundary-marks is dependent upon the neighbours.
iast: kṣetrakūpataḍāgānāmārāmasya gṛhasya ca sāmantapratyayo jñeyaḥ sīmāsetuvinirṇayaḥ

sanskrit_iast: sāmantāścetmṛṣā brūyuḥ setau vivādatāṃ nṛṇām sarve pṛthak pṛthag daṇḍyā rājñā madhyamasāhasam
meaning: सामन्ताश्चेत्मृषा ब्रूयुः सेतौ विवादतां नृणाम् सर्वे पृथक् पृथग् दण्ड्या राज्ञा मध्यमसाहसम्
text: In the case of men disputing about boundary-marks, if the neighbours depose falsely, all of them should be severally punished by the king with the ‘middle amercement.’
iast: sāmantāścetmṛṣā brūyuḥ setau vivādatāṃ nṛṇām sarve pṛthak pṛthag daṇḍyā rājñā madhyamasāhasam

sanskrit_iast: gṛhaṃ taḍāgamārāmaṃ kṣetraṃ vā bhīṣayā haran śatāni pañca daṇḍyaḥ syādajñānāddviśato damaḥ
meaning: गृहं तडागमारामं क्षेत्रं वा भीषया हरन् शतानि पञ्च दण्ड्यः स्यादज्ञानाद्द्विशतो दमः
text: If a person, by intimidation, appropriates a house, a tank, a garden, or a field, he shall be fined five hundred; but only two hundred, if he does it in ignorance.
iast: gṛhaṃ taḍāgamārāmaṃ kṣetraṃ vā bhīṣayā haran śatāni pañca daṇḍyaḥ syādajñānāddviśato damaḥ

sanskrit_iast: sīmāyāmaviṣahyāyāṃ svayaṃ rājaiva dharmavit pradiśedbhūmimekeṣāmupakārāditi sthitiḥ
meaning: सीमायामविषह्यायां स्वयं राजैव धर्मवित् प्रदिशेद्भूमिमेकेषामुपकारादिति स्थितिः
text: In the event of the boundary being unascertainable, the righteous king shall himself assign to them their lands, on the basis of advantages. Such is the established law.
iast: sīmāyāmaviṣahyāyāṃ svayaṃ rājaiva dharmavit pradiśedbhūmimekeṣāmupakārāditi sthitiḥ

sanskrit_iast: eṣo 'khilenābhihito dharmaḥ sīmāvinirṇaye ata ūrdhvaṃ pravakṣyāmi vākpāruṣyavinirṇayam
meaning: एषो 'खिलेनाभिहितो धर्मः सीमाविनिर्णये अत ऊर्ध्वं प्रवक्ष्यामि वाक्पारुष्यविनिर्णयम्
text: Thus has the whole law relating to the demarcation of boundaries been propounded. After this I am going to expound that relating to verbal assault.
iast: eṣo 'khilenābhihito dharmaḥ sīmāvinirṇaye ata ūrdhvaṃ pravakṣyāmi vākpāruṣyavinirṇayam

sanskrit_iast: śataṃ brāhmaṇamākruśya kṣatriyo daṇḍamarhati vaiśyo 'pyardhaśataṃ dve vā śūdrastu vadhamarhati
meaning: शतं ब्राह्मणमाक्रुश्य क्षत्रियो दण्डमर्हति वैश्यो 'प्यर्धशतं द्वे वा शूद्रस्तु वधमर्हति
text: On abusing a Brāhmaṇa the Kṣatriya should be fined one hundred; and the Vaiśya one hundred and fifty; or two hundred; the Śūdra however deserves immolation.
iast: śataṃ brāhmaṇamākruśya kṣatriyo daṇḍamarhati vaiśyo 'pyardhaśataṃ dve vā śūdrastu vadhamarhati

sanskrit_iast: pañcāśadbrāhmaṇo daṇḍyaḥ kṣatriyasyābhiśaṃsane vaiśye syādardhapañcāśatśūdre dvādaśako damaḥ
meaning: पञ्चाशद्ब्राह्मणो दण्ड्यः क्षत्रियस्याभिशंसने वैश्ये स्यादर्धपञ्चाशत्शूद्रे द्वादशको दमः
text: For abusing a Kṣatriya, the Brāhmaṇa should be fined fifty; and in the case of a Vaiśya, the fine shall be twenty-five; and in that of a Shudra, twelve.
iast: pañcāśadbrāhmaṇo daṇḍyaḥ kṣatriyasyābhiśaṃsane vaiśye syādardhapañcāśatśūdre dvādaśako damaḥ

sanskrit_iast: samavarṇe dvijātīnāṃ dvādaśaiva vyatikrame vādeṣvavacanīyeṣu tadeva dviguṇaṃ bhavet
meaning: समवर्णे द्विजातीनां द्वादशैव व्यतिक्रमे वादेष्ववचनीयेषु तदेव द्विगुणं भवेत्
text: Among twice-born men, when there is offence against an equal, the fine is twelve only in the case of unutterable abuses, it shall be double.
iast: samavarṇe dvijātīnāṃ dvādaśaiva vyatikrame vādeṣvavacanīyeṣu tadeva dviguṇaṃ bhavet

sanskrit_iast: ekajātirdvijātīṃstu vācā dāruṇayā kṣipan jihvāyāḥ prāpnuyācchedaṃ jaghanyaprabhavo hi saḥ
meaning: एकजातिर्द्विजातींस्तु वाचा दारुणया क्षिपन् जिह्वायाः प्राप्नुयाच्छेदं जघन्यप्रभवो हि सः
text: If a once-born person insults a twice-born one with gross abuse, he should suffer the cutting off of his tongue; as he is of low origin.
iast: ekajātirdvijātīṃstu vācā dāruṇayā kṣipan jihvāyāḥ prāpnuyācchedaṃ jaghanyaprabhavo hi saḥ

sanskrit_iast: nāmajātigrahaṃ tveṣāmabhidroheṇa kurvataḥ nikṣepyo 'yomayaḥ śaṅkurjvalannāsye daśāṅgulaḥ
meaning: नामजातिग्रहं त्वेषामभिद्रोहेण कुर्वतः निक्षेप्यो 'योमयः शङ्कुर्ज्वलन्नास्ये दशाङ्गुलः
text: If he mentions the name and caste of these men with scorn, a burning iron nail ten inches long shall be thrust into his mouth.
iast: nāmajātigrahaṃ tveṣāmabhidroheṇa kurvataḥ nikṣepyo 'yomayaḥ śaṅkurjvalannāsye daśāṅgulaḥ

sanskrit_iast: dharmaupadeśaṃ darpeṇa viprāṇāmasya kurvataḥ taptamāsecayet tailaṃ vaktre śrotre ca pārthivaḥ śrautre
meaning: धर्मौपदेशं दर्पेण विप्राणामस्य कुर्वतः तप्तमासेचयेत् तैलं वक्त्रे श्रोत्रे च पार्थिवः श्रौत्रे
text: If through arrogance, he teaches brāhmaṇas their duty, the king shall pour heated oil into his mouth and ears.
iast: dharmaupadeśaṃ darpeṇa viprāṇāmasya kurvataḥ taptamāsecayet tailaṃ vaktre śrotre ca pārthivaḥ śrautre

sanskrit_iast: śrutaṃ deśaṃ ca jātiṃ ca karma śarīrameva ca vitathena bruvan darpāddāpyaḥ syāddviśataṃ damam
meaning: श्रुतं देशं च जातिं च कर्म शरीरमेव च वितथेन ब्रुवन् दर्पाद्दाप्यः स्याद्द्विशतं दमम्
text: He who, through arrogance, speaks falsely regarding the learning, the habitat, the caste, the occupation, or the bodily details (of another person), should be made to pay a pine of two hundred.
iast: śrutaṃ deśaṃ ca jātiṃ ca karma śarīrameva ca vitathena bruvan darpāddāpyaḥ syāddviśataṃ damam

sanskrit_iast: kāṇaṃ vā 'pyatha vā khañjamanyaṃ vā 'pi tathāvidham tathyenāpi bruvan dāpyo daṇḍaṃ kārṣāpaṇāvaram
meaning: काणं वा 'प्यथ वा खञ्जमन्यं वा 'पि तथाविधम् तथ्येनापि ब्रुवन् दाप्यो दण्डं कार्षापणावरम्
text: If a man, even truly, calls another ‘one-eyed’ or ‘lame’ or something else like it,—he should be made to pay a fine of at least one ‘Kārṣāpaṇa.’
iast: kāṇaṃ vā 'pyatha vā khañjamanyaṃ vā 'pi tathāvidham tathyenāpi bruvan dāpyo daṇḍaṃ kārṣāpaṇāvaram

sanskrit_iast: mātaraṃ pitaraṃ jāyāṃ bhrātaraṃ tanayaṃ gurum ākṣārayaṃśataṃ dāpyaḥ panthānaṃ cādadadguroḥ
meaning: मातरं पितरं जायां भ्रातरं तनयं गुरुम् आक्षारयंशतं दाप्यः पन्थानं चाददद्गुरोः
text: He who alienates the mother, the father, the wife, the brother, the child or the preceptor, should be made to pay a hundred; as also one who does not give the way to his preceptor.
iast: mātaraṃ pitaraṃ jāyāṃ bhrātaraṃ tanayaṃ gurum ākṣārayaṃśataṃ dāpyaḥ panthānaṃ cādadadguroḥ

sanskrit_iast: brāhmaṇakṣatriyābhyāṃ tu daṇḍaḥ kāryo vijānatā brāhmaṇe sāhasaḥ pūrvaḥ kṣatriye tveva madhyamaḥ
meaning: ब्राह्मणक्षत्रियाभ्यां तु दण्डः कार्यो विजानता ब्राह्मणे साहसः पूर्वः क्षत्रिये त्वेव मध्यमः
text: The discerning king shall inflict this punishment upon the Brāhmaṇa and the Kṣatriya: the brāhmaṇa shall be fined the lowest amercement and the kṣatriya the middlemost
iast: brāhmaṇakṣatriyābhyāṃ tu daṇḍaḥ kāryo vijānatā brāhmaṇe sāhasaḥ pūrvaḥ kṣatriye tveva madhyamaḥ

sanskrit_iast: viśśūdrayorevameva svajātiṃ prati tattvataḥ chedavarjaṃ praṇayanaṃ daṇḍasyaiti viniścayaḥ
meaning: विश्शूद्रयोरेवमेव स्वजातिं प्रति तत्त्वतः छेदवर्जं प्रणयनं दण्डस्यैति विनिश्चयः
text: On the Vaiśya and the Śūdra also, the inflicting of punishment shall be of the same kind, according to their respective castes,—barring mutilation; such is the decision.
iast: viśśūdrayorevameva svajātiṃ prati tattvataḥ chedavarjaṃ praṇayanaṃ daṇḍasyaiti viniścayaḥ

sanskrit_iast: eṣa daṇḍavidhiḥ prokto vākpāruṣyasya tattvataḥ ata ūrdhvaṃ pravakṣyāmi daṇḍapāruṣyanirṇayam
meaning: एष दण्डविधिः प्रोक्तो वाक्पारुष्यस्य तत्त्वतः अत ऊर्ध्वं प्रवक्ष्यामि दण्डपारुष्यनिर्णयम्
text: Thus the law relating to punishments in connection with verbal assaults been truly expounded; after thisI am going to profound the law relating to physical assault.
iast: eṣa daṇḍavidhiḥ prokto vākpāruṣyasya tattvataḥ ata ūrdhvaṃ pravakṣyāmi daṇḍapāruṣyanirṇayam

sanskrit_iast: yena kena cidaṅgena hiṃsyāccetśreṣṭhamantyajaḥ chettavyaṃ tadtadevāsya tan manoranuśāsanam
meaning: येन केन चिदङ्गेन हिंस्याच्चेत्श्रेष्ठमन्त्यजः छेत्तव्यं तद्तदेवास्य तन् मनोरनुशासनम्
text: With whatever limb the low-born man hurts a superior person, every such limb of his shall be cut off; this is the teaching of Manu.
iast: yena kena cidaṅgena hiṃsyāccetśreṣṭhamantyajaḥ chettavyaṃ tadtadevāsya tan manoranuśāsanam

sanskrit_iast: pāṇimudyamya daṇḍaṃ vā pāṇicchedanamarhati pādena praharan kopāt pādacchedanamarhati
meaning: पाणिमुद्यम्य दण्डं वा पाणिच्छेदनमर्हति पादेन प्रहरन् कोपात् पादच्छेदनमर्हति
text: If he raises his hand or a stick, he should have his hand cut off; if he strikes in anger with the foot, his foot shall be cut off.
iast: pāṇimudyamya daṇḍaṃ vā pāṇicchedanamarhati pādena praharan kopāt pādacchedanamarhati

sanskrit_iast: sahāsanamabhiprepsurutkṛṣṭasyāpakṛṣṭajaḥ kaṭyāṃ kṛtāṅko nirvāsyaḥ sphicaṃ vā 'syāvakartayet
meaning: सहासनमभिप्रेप्सुरुत्कृष्टस्यापकृष्टजः कट्यां कृताङ्को निर्वास्यः स्फिचं वा 'स्यावकर्तयेत्
text: If a low-born person tries to occupy the same seat with his superior, he should be branded on the hip and banished; or the king shall have his buttocks cut off.
iast: sahāsanamabhiprepsurutkṛṣṭasyāpakṛṣṭajaḥ kaṭyāṃ kṛtāṅko nirvāsyaḥ sphicaṃ vā 'syāvakartayet

sanskrit_iast: avaniṣṭhīvato darpāddvāvoṣṭhau chedayennṛpaḥ avamūtrayato meḍhramavaśardhayato gudam
meaning: अवनिष्ठीवतो दर्पाद्द्वावोष्ठौ छेदयेन्नृपः अवमूत्रयतो मेढ्रमवशर्धयतो गुदम्
text: If, out of arrogance, he spits, the king should have his two lips cut off; if he urinates, then his penis; and if he breaks wind, his anus.
iast: avaniṣṭhīvato darpāddvāvoṣṭhau chedayennṛpaḥ avamūtrayato meḍhramavaśardhayato gudam

sanskrit_iast: keśeṣu gṛhṇato hastau chedayedavicārayan pādayordāḍhikāyāṃ ca grīvāyāṃ vṛṣaṇeṣu ca
meaning: केशेषु गृह्णतो हस्तौ छेदयेदविचारयन् पादयोर्दाढिकायां च ग्रीवायां वृषणेषु च
